Abstract: Biomedical knowledge resources often either preserve evidence as unstructured text or compress it into flat triples that omit study design, provenance, and quantitative support. Here we present EvidenceNet, a framework and dataset for building disease-specific knowledge graphs from full-text biomedical literature. EvidenceNet uses a large language model (LLM)-assisted pipeline to extract experimentally grounded findings as structured evidence nodes, normalize biomedical entities, score evidence quality, and connect evidence records through typed semantic relations. We release two resources: EvidenceNet-HCC with 7,872 evidence records, 10,328 graph nodes, and 49,756 edges, and EvidenceNet-CRC with 6,622 records, 8,795 nodes, and 39,361 edges. Technical validation shows high component fidelity, including 98.3% field-level extraction accuracy, 100.0% high-confidence entity-link accuracy, 87.5% fusion integrity, and 90.0% semantic relation-type accuracy. In downstream evaluation, EvidenceNet improves internal and external retrieval-augmented question answering and retains structural signal for future link prediction and target prioritization. These results establish EvidenceNet as a disease-specific resource for evidence-aware biomedical reasoning and hypothesis generation.

</details>


### [483] [Trust-Aware Routing for Distributed Generative AI Inference at the Edge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28622)
*Chanh Nguyen,Erik Elmroth*

Main category: cs.DC

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: G-TRAC是一个面向去中心化边缘设备上生成式AI推理的信任感知协调框架，通过风险约束最短路径算法和混合信任架构，在异构环境中实现可靠的分布式推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着生成式AI在去中心化异构边缘设备上的部署增加，单个设备故障或恶意行为可能破坏整个推理过程，传统的最佳努力P2P路由已不足够，需要显式考虑可靠性、性能可变性和节点信任的协调机制。

Method: 1) 将路由问题形式化为风险约束最短路径计算，提出结合信任阈值剪枝和Dijkstra搜索的多项式时间解决方案；2) 采用混合信任架构，在稳定锚点维护全局声誉状态，通过后台同步向边缘节点传播轻量级更新。

Result: 在异构商用设备测试平台上，G-TRAC显著提高了推理完成率，有效隔离不可靠节点，即使在节点故障和网络分区情况下也能保持稳健执行。路由延迟中位数在实用边缘规模下低于1毫秒，较大规模下低于10毫秒。

Conclusion: G-TRAC为去中心化边缘环境中的生成式AI推理提供了有效的信任感知协调框架，解决了可靠性、性能和信任管理的挑战。

Abstract: Emerging deployments of Generative AI increasingly execute inference across decentralized and heterogeneous edge devices rather than on a single trusted server. In such environments, a single device failure or misbehavior can disrupt the entire inference process, making traditional best-effort peer-to-peer routing insufficient. Coordinating distributed generative inference therefore requires mechanisms that explicitly account for reliability, performance variability, and trust among participating peers.
  In this paper, we present G-TRAC, a trust-aware coordination framework that integrates algorithmic path selection with system-level protocol design to ensure robust distributed inference. First, we formulate the routing problem as a \textit{Risk-Bounded Shortest Path} computation and introduce a polynomial-time solution that combines trust-floor pruning with Dijkstra's search, achieving sub-millisecond median routing latency at practical edge scales, and remaining below 10 ms at larger scales. Second, to operationally support the routing logic in dynamic environments, the framework employs a \textit{Hybrid Trust Architecture} that maintains global reputation state at stable anchors while disseminating lightweight updates to edge peers via background synchronization.
  Experimental evaluation on a heterogeneous testbed of commodity devices demonstrates that G-TRAC significantly improves inference completion rates, effectively isolates unreliable peers, and sustains robust execution even under node failures and network partitions.

</details>


### [484] [SAGAI-MID: A Generative AI-Driven Middleware for Dynamic Runtime Interoperability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28731)
*Oliver Aleksander Larsen,Mahyar T. Moghaddam*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: SAGAI-MID：基于LLM的中间件，动态检测和解决分布式系统中的模式不匹配问题，通过五层管道实现运行时模式适配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代分布式系统集成了异构服务（不同版本的REST API、GraphQL端点、IoT设备），存在持续的模式不匹配问题。传统静态适配器需要为每对模式手动编码，无法处理运行时的新组合。

Method: 基于FastAPI的中间件，采用五层管道：1) 混合检测（结构差异+LLM语义分析）；2) 双重解决策略（每请求LLM转换和LLM生成的可重用适配器代码）；3) 三层保护栈（验证、集成投票、基于规则的备选方案）。架构基于Bass等人的互操作性策略，将其从设计时构件转化为运行时能力。

Result: 在10个互操作性场景（REST版本迁移、IoT到分析桥接、GraphQL协议转换）上评估，跨越两个提供商的6个LLM。最佳配置达到0.90 pass@1准确率。CODEGEN策略始终优于DIRECT（0.83 vs 0.77平均pass@1）。成本在不同模型间差异超过30倍，但最准确的模型也是最便宜的。

Conclusion: LLM可以作为运行时架构组件，为软件架构师提供动态解决模式不匹配的能力。CODEGEN策略比直接转换更有效，且成本效益模型选择很重要。

Abstract: Modern distributed systems integrate heterogeneous services, REST APIs with different schema versions, GraphQL endpoints, and IoT devices with proprietary payloads that suffer from persistent schema mismatches. Traditional static adapters require manual coding for every schema pair and cannot handle novel combinations at runtime. We present SAGAI-MID, a FastAPI-based middleware that uses large language models (LLMs) to dynamically detect and resolve schema mismatches at runtime. The system employs a five-layer pipeline: hybrid detection (structural diff plus LLM semantic analysis), dual resolution strategies (per-request LLM transformation and LLM-generated reusable adapter code), and a three-tier safeguard stack (validation, ensemble voting, rule-based fallback). We frame the architecture through Bass et al.'s interoperability tactics, transforming them from design-time artifacts into runtime capabilities. We evaluate SAGAI-MID on 10 interoperability scenarios spanning REST version migration, IoT-to-analytics bridging, and GraphQL protocol conversion across six LLMs from two providers. The best-performing configuration achieves 0.90 pass@1 accuracy. The CODEGEN strategy consistently outperforms DIRECT (0.83 vs 0.77 mean pass@1), while cost varies by over 30x across models with no proportional accuracy gain; the most accurate model is also the cheapest. We discuss implications for software architects adopting LLMs as runtime architectural components.

</details>


### [485] [Bitboard version of Tetris AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26765)
*Xingguo Chen,Pingshou Xiong,Zhenyu Luo,Mengfei Hu,Xinwen Li,Yongzhou Lü,Guang Yang,Chao Li,Shangdong Yang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出基于位棋盘优化的高性能Tetris AI框架，通过位运算加速游戏模拟53倍，引入后状态评估网络简化状态估值，优化PPO算法实现高效训练，提供符合OpenAI Gym标准的Python-Java接口。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Tetris实现存在模拟速度慢、状态评估次优、训练效率低等问题，限制了其在大规模强化学习研究中的实用性。需要开发高性能框架来提升Tetris作为RL基准测试的效用。

Method: 1) 使用位棋盘表示法重新设计游戏板和方块，利用位运算加速碰撞检测、消行等核心过程；2) 引入后状态评估行动者网络，利用Tetris后状态特性简化状态价值估计；3) 提出缓冲区优化的PPO算法，平衡采样和更新效率；4) 开发符合OpenAI Gym标准的Python-Java接口。

Result: 实现53倍于OpenAI Gym-Tetris的加速；在10x10网格上3分钟内达到平均分数3829；提供与现代化RL框架无缝集成的接口。

Conclusion: 该框架通过将底层位棋盘优化与高层AI策略结合，增强了Tetris作为RL基准测试的实用性，为可扩展的顺序决策研究提供了样本高效且计算轻量的解决方案。

Abstract: The efficiency of game engines and policy optimization algorithms is crucial for training reinforcement learning (RL) agents in complex sequential decision-making tasks, such as Tetris. Existing Tetris implementations suffer from low simulation speeds, suboptimal state evaluation, and inefficient training paradigms, limiting their utility for large-scale RL research. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a high-performance Tetris AI framework based on bitboard optimization and improved RL algorithms. First, we redesign the Tetris game board and tetrominoes using bitboard representations, leveraging bitwise operations to accelerate core processes (e.g., collision detection, line clearing, and Dellacherie-Thiery Features extraction) and achieve a 53-fold speedup compared to OpenAI Gym-Tetris. Second, we introduce an afterstate-evaluating actor network that simplifies state value estimation by leveraging Tetris afterstate property, outperforming traditional action-value networks with fewer parameters. Third, we propose a buffer-optimized Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm that balances sampling and update efficiency, achieving an average score of 3,829 on 10x10 grids within 3 minutes. Additionally, we develop a Python-Java interface compliant with the OpenAI Gym standard, enabling seamless integration with modern RL frameworks. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework enhances Tetris's utility as an RL benchmark by bridging low-level bitboard optimizations with high-level AI strategies, providing a sample-efficient and computationally lightweight solution for scalable sequential decision-making research.

</details>


### [486] [Multiverse: Language-Conditioned Multi-Game Level Blending via Shared Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26782)
*In-Chang Baek,Jiyun Jung,Sung-Hyun Kim,Geum-Hwan Hwang,Kyung-Joong Kim*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: Multiverse：一个语言条件化的多游戏关卡生成器，通过文本规范实现跨游戏关卡融合，利用共享潜在空间对齐文本指令和关卡结构，支持可控的跨游戏内容生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本到关卡生成器通常局限于单一游戏领域，无法扩展到多游戏场景。需要学习能够捕捉跨领域结构关系的表示，以实现语言条件化的多游戏内容生成和跨游戏关卡融合。

Method: 提出Multiverse模型，学习共享潜在空间对齐文本指令和关卡结构。采用基于阈值的多正对比监督方法，连接跨游戏的语义相关关卡。通过潜在插值和组合文本提示实现可控融合和零样本生成。

Result: 学习到的表示支持可控的跨游戏关卡融合，显著提高了同类型游戏内的融合质量，并为语言条件化的多游戏内容生成提供了统一表示。

Conclusion: Multiverse通过共享潜在空间表示和多正对比监督，成功实现了语言驱动的跨游戏关卡生成和融合，为多游戏内容生成提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Text-to-level generation aims to translate natural language descriptions into structured game levels, enabling intuitive control over procedural content generation. While prior text-to-level generators are typically limited to a single game domain, extending language-conditioned generation to multiple games requires learning representations that capture structural relationships across domains. We propose Multiverse, a language-conditioned multi-game level generator that enables cross-game level blending through textual specifications. The model learns a shared latent space aligning textual instructions and level structures, while a threshold-based multi-positive contrastive supervision links semantically related levels across games. This representation allows language to guide which structural characteristics should be preserved when combining content from different games, enabling controllable blending through latent interpolation and zero-shot generation from compositional textual prompts. Experiments show that the learned representation supports controllable cross-game level blending and significantly improves blending quality within the same game genre, while providing a unified representation for language-conditioned multi-game content generation.

</details>


### [487] [Concerning Uncertainty -- A Systematic Survey of Uncertainty-Aware XAI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26838)
*Helena Löfström,Tuwe Löfström,Anders Hjort,Fatima Rabia Yapicioglu*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该论文综述了不确定性感知的可解释人工智能（UAXAI），探讨了如何将不确定性融入解释流程以及这些方法的评估方式。论文识别了三种主要的不确定性量化方法（贝叶斯、蒙特卡洛和保形方法），以及将不确定性整合到解释中的不同策略。评估实践仍然分散且以模型为中心，缺乏对用户的关注和对可靠性属性的不一致报告。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI系统在关键决策中的应用日益增多，需要同时保证模型的可解释性和可靠性。当前的可解释AI方法往往忽视不确定性量化，而传统的不确定性方法又缺乏解释性。UAXAI旨在弥合这一差距，将不确定性感知与可解释性相结合，以建立更可信的AI系统。

Method: 论文采用系统性文献综述方法，分析UAXAI领域的现有研究。识别了三种主要的不确定性量化方法：贝叶斯方法、蒙特卡洛方法和保形方法。同时总结了将不确定性整合到解释中的三种策略：评估可信度、约束模型或解释、以及明确传达不确定性。

Result: 研究发现该领域评估实践分散且以模型为中心，对用户关注有限，可靠性属性（如校准、覆盖范围、解释稳定性）报告不一致。近期研究趋势偏向校准、无分布技术，并将解释器变异性视为核心问题。论文提出了统一的评估原则需求。

Conclusion: UAXAI的进展需要统一的评估原则，将不确定性传播、鲁棒性和人类决策联系起来。反事实和校准方法被认为是将可解释性与可靠性对齐的有前景途径。该领域需要更多关注用户中心评估和标准化报告实践。

Abstract: This paper surveys uncertainty-aware explainable artificial intelligence (UAXAI), examining how uncertainty is incorporated into explanatory pipelines and how such methods are evaluated. Across the literature, three recurring approaches to uncertainty quantification emerge (Bayesian, Monte Carlo, and Conformal methods), alongside distinct strategies for integrating uncertainty into explanations: assessing trustworthiness, constraining models or explanations, and explicitly communicating uncertainty. Evaluation practices remain fragmented and largely model centered, with limited attention to users and inconsistent reporting of reliability properties (e.g., calibration, coverage, explanation stability). Recent work leans towards calibration, distribution free techniques and recognizes explainer variability as a central concern. We argue that progress in UAXAI requires unified evaluation principles that link uncertainty propagation, robustness, and human decision-making, and highlight counterfactual and calibration approaches as promising avenues for aligning interpretability with reliability.

</details>


### [488] [Neuro-Symbolic Learning for Predictive Process Monitoring via Two-Stage Logic Tensor Networks with Rule Pruning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26944)
*Fabrizio De Santis,Gyunam Park,Francesco Zanichelli*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出一种神经符号方法，将领域知识作为可微逻辑约束集成到序列事件预测中，通过两阶段优化策略解决逻辑网络在满足逻辑公式时可能牺牲预测准确性的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据驱动方法学习历史数据的相关性，但未能纳入领域特定的序列约束和事件关系的逻辑规则，限制了准确性和监管合规性。例如医疗程序必须遵循特定顺序，金融交易必须遵守合规规则。

Method: 神经符号方法，使用逻辑张量网络（LTNs）将领域知识作为可微逻辑约束集成。使用线性时序逻辑和一阶逻辑形式化控制流、时序和有效载荷知识。关键贡献是两阶段优化策略：1）预训练期间使用加权公理损失优先学习数据；2）基于满足动态的规则剪枝，仅保留一致且贡献的公理。

Result: 在四个真实世界事件日志上的评估显示，领域知识注入显著提高了预测性能，两阶段优化对知识有效性至关重要（没有它，知识可能严重降低性能）。该方法在合规约束场景中表现尤为出色，特别是在合规训练样本有限的情况下，相比纯数据驱动基线实现了优越性能，同时确保遵守领域约束。

Conclusion: 提出的神经符号方法成功地将领域知识集成到序列事件预测中，通过两阶段优化策略平衡了逻辑约束满足和预测准确性，在合规约束场景中特别有效，为需要领域知识指导的预测任务提供了有前景的解决方案。

Abstract: Predictive modeling on sequential event data is critical for fraud detection and healthcare monitoring. Existing data-driven approaches learn correlations from historical data but fail to incorporate domain-specific sequential constraints and logical rules governing event relationships, limiting accuracy and regulatory compliance. For example, healthcare procedures must follow specific sequences, and financial transactions must adhere to compliance rules. We present a neuro-symbolic approach integrating domain knowledge as differentiable logical constraints using Logic Networks (LTNs). We formalize control-flow, temporal, and payload knowledge using Linear Temporal Logic and first-order logic. Our key contribution is a two-stage optimization strategy addressing LTNs' tendency to satisfy logical formulas at the expense of predictive accuracy. The approach uses weighted axiom loss during pretraining to prioritize data learning, followed by rule pruning that retains only consistent, contributive axioms based on satisfaction dynamics. Evaluation on four real-world event logs shows that domain knowledge injection significantly improves predictive performance, with the two-stage optimization proving essential knowledge (without it, knowledge can severely degrade performance). The approach excels particularly in compliance-constrained scenarios with limited compliant training examples, achieving superior performance compared to purely data-driven baselines while ensuring adherence to domain constraints.

</details>


### [489] [FormalProofBench: Can Models Write Graduate Level Math Proofs That Are Formally Verified?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26996)
*Nikil Ravi,Kexing Ying,Vasilii Nesterov,Rayan Krishnan,Elif Uskuplu,Bingyu Xia,Janitha Aswedige,Langston Nashold*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: FormalProofBench是一个评估AI模型生成形式化验证数学证明能力的私有基准，要求模型为研究生级数学问题输出能被Lean 4检查器接受的证明，最佳模型准确率33.5%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI模型在数学推理方面取得进展，但缺乏评估其形式化定理证明能力的专门基准。作者旨在填补这一空白，创建专注于研究生级数学的形式化证明基准，以更严谨地评估模型的形式化推理能力。

Method: 构建FormalProofBench基准，包含自然语言问题与对应的Lean 4形式化陈述配对的任务。问题来源包括资格考试和标准教科书，涵盖分析、代数、概率和逻辑等主题。使用代理框架评估前沿模型，要求模型输出能被Lean 4检查器接受的证明。

Result: 最佳基础模型达到33.5%的准确率，其他模型性能迅速下降。除了准确率数据，还提供了工具使用、失败模式、成本和延迟的实证分析，全面评估了前沿模型的形式化定理证明能力。

Conclusion: FormalProofBench为评估AI模型的形式化数学推理能力提供了重要基准，揭示了当前模型在研究生级数学证明方面的局限性，为未来研究提供了评估框架和分析洞见。

Abstract: We present FormalProofBench, a private benchmark designed to evaluate whether AI models can produce formally verified mathematical proofs at the graduate level. Each task pairs a natural-language problem with a Lean~4 formal statement, and a model must output a Lean proof accepted by the Lean 4 checker. FormalProofBench targets advanced undergraduate and graduate mathematics, with problems drawn from qualifying exams and standard textbooks across topics including analysis, algebra, probability, and logic. We evaluate a range of frontier models with an agentic harness, and find that the best-performing foundation model achieves 33.5% accuracy, with performance dropping rapidly after that. In addition to the accuracy numbers, we also provide empirical analysis of tool-use, failure modes, cost and latency, thereby providing a thorough evaluation of the formal-theorem proving abilities of frontier models.

</details>


### [490] [AutoMS: Multi-Agent Evolutionary Search for Cross-Physics Inverse Microstructure Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27195)
*Zhenyuan Zhao,Yu Xing,Tianyang Xue,Lingxin Cao,Xin Yan,Lin Lu*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: AutoMS：一个多智能体神经符号框架，将材料微结构逆设计重构为LLM驱动的进化搜索，通过模拟感知进化搜索解决传统方法的物理幻觉问题，在17个跨物理任务上达到83.8%成功率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 材料科学中设计满足耦合跨物理目标的微结构是一个基本挑战。逆设计问题涉及巨大、不连续的搜索空间，传统拓扑优化计算成本高，而深度生成模型常出现"物理幻觉"，缺乏确保严格有效性的能力。

Method: 提出AutoMS多智能体神经符号框架，将LLM作为"语义导航器"初始化搜索空间并打破局部最优，同时引入模拟感知进化搜索(SAES)利用模拟反馈进行局部梯度近似和定向参数更新，通过管理器、解析器、生成器和模拟器等专门智能体协同工作。

Result: 在17个多样跨物理任务上达到83.8%成功率，几乎是传统NSGA-II(43.7%)的两倍，显著优于基于ReAct的LLM基线(53.3%)，分层架构减少总执行时间23.3%。

Conclusion: 自主智能体系统能有效导航复杂物理景观，弥合语义设计意图与严格物理有效性之间的差距，为材料逆设计提供新范式。

Abstract: Designing microstructures that satisfy coupled cross-physics objectives is a fundamental challenge in material science. This inverse design problem involves a vast, discontinuous search space where traditional topology optimization is computationally prohibitive, and deep generative models often suffer from "physical hallucinations," lacking the capability to ensure rigorous validity. To address this limitation, we introduce AutoMS, a multi-agent neuro-symbolic framework that reformulates inverse design as an LLM-driven evolutionary search. Unlike methods that treat LLMs merely as interfaces, AutoMS integrates them as "semantic navigators" to initialize search spaces and break local optima, while our novel Simulation-Aware Evolutionary Search (SAES) addresses the "blindness" of traditional evolutionary strategies. Specifically, SAES utilizes simulation feedback to perform local gradient approximation and directed parameter updates, effectively guiding the search toward physically valid Pareto frontiers. Orchestrating specialized agents (Manager, Parser, Generator, and Simulator), AutoMS achieves a state-of-the-art 83.8\% success rate on 17 diverse cross-physics tasks, nearly doubling the performance of traditional NSGA-II (43.7\%) and significantly outperforming ReAct-based LLM baselines (53.3\%). Furthermore, our hierarchical architecture reduces total execution time by 23.3\%. AutoMS demonstrates that autonomous agent systems can effectively navigate complex physical landscapes, bridging the gap between semantic design intent and rigorous physical validity.

</details>


### [491] [Self-evolving AI agents for protein discovery and directed evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27303)
*Yang Tan,Lingrong Zhang,Mingchen Li,Yuanxi Yu,Bozitao Zhong,Bingxin Zhou,Nanqing Dong,Liang Hong*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: VenusFactory2是一个自主的多智能体框架，通过动态工作流合成而非静态工具使用，解决蛋白质科学发现中的复杂需求，在VenusAgentEval基准测试中优于现有智能体


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 蛋白质科学发现受限于人工协调信息和算法，而通用智能体在复杂领域项目中能力不足。需要从静态工具使用转向动态工作流合成的自主框架来解决蛋白质相关需求

Method: 采用自演化的多智能体基础设施，通过动态工作流合成实现自主蛋白质发现和优化。框架能够从单一自然语言提示出发，自主组织蛋白质发现过程

Result: 在VenusAgentEval基准测试中优于一系列知名智能体，能够自主组织蛋白质的发现和优化过程

Conclusion: VenusFactory2通过动态工作流合成和多智能体基础设施，有效解决了蛋白质科学发现中的自动化瓶颈，展示了在复杂生物信息学任务中的优越性能

Abstract: Protein scientific discovery is bottlenecked by the manual orchestration of information and algorithms, while general agents are insufficient in complex domain projects. VenusFactory2 provides an autonomous framework that shifts from static tool usage to dynamic workflow synthesis via a self-evolving multi-agent infrastructure to address protein-related demands. It outperforms a set of well-known agents on the VenusAgentEval benchmark, and autonomously organizes the discovery and optimization of proteins from a single natural language prompt.

</details>


### [492] [What does a system modify when it modifies itself?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27611)
*Florentin Koch*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了一个形式化框架来分析自我修改系统的层次结构，区分了四种修改机制，并揭示了人类与AI在自我修改能力上的交叉不对称性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 认知科学和人工智能领域都研究自我修改系统，但缺乏一个统一的形式化框架来区分不同类型的修改目标（如执行控制、元认知、层次学习）。需要建立共同标准来比较生物认知与人工系统的自我修改能力。

Method: 构建了一个最小结构框架：包含规则层次、固定核心，区分有效规则、表示规则和因果可访问规则。识别了四种修改机制：(1)无修改行动，(2)低级修改，(3)结构修改，(4)目的性修订。每种机制都对应认知现象和人工系统实例。

Result: 发现人类与AI在自我修改能力上存在"交叉不对称性"：人类在高层级有自我表示和因果能力但操作层级不透明，而AI在操作层级有丰富表示和因果访问但缺乏高层级评估能力。提出了四个可测试预测和四个开放问题。

Conclusion: 该框架为比较人类与AI的自我修改能力提供了结构特征，对人工意识研究有启示作用，将高阶理论和注意力图式理论作为特例。框架有助于理解自我修改系统的本质特征和限制。

Abstract: When a cognitive system modifies its own functioning, what exactly does it modify: a low-level rule, a control rule, or the norm that evaluates its own revisions? Cognitive science describes executive control, metacognition, and hierarchical learning with precision, but lacks a formal framework distinguishing these targets of transformation. Contemporary artificial intelligence likewise exhibits self-modification without common criteria for comparison with biological cognition.
  We show that the question of what counts as a self-modifying system entails a minimal structure: a hierarchy of rules, a fixed core, and a distinction between effective rules, represented rules, and causally accessible rules. Four regimes are identified: (1) action without modification, (2) low-level modification, (3) structural modification, and (4) teleological revision. Each regime is anchored in a cognitive phenomenon and a corresponding artificial system.
  Applied to humans, the framework yields a central result: a crossing of opacities. Humans have self-representation and causal power concentrated at upper hierarchical levels, while operational levels remain largely opaque. Reflexive artificial systems display the inverse profile: rich representation and causal access at operational levels, but none at the highest evaluative level. This crossed asymmetry provides a structural signature for human-AI comparison. The framework also offers insight into artificial consciousness, with higher-order theories and Attention Schema Theory as special cases. We derive four testable predictions and identify four open problems: the independence of transformativity and autonomy, the viability of self-modification, the teleological lock, and identity under transformation.

</details>


### [493] [SkyNet: Belief-Aware Planning for Partially-Observable Stochastic Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27751)
*Adam Haile*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: SkyNet (Belief-Aware MuZero) 扩展了MuZero到部分可观测、随机、多玩家环境，通过添加自我条件化的辅助头来预测获胜者和排名，无需显式信念状态跟踪。在Skyjo卡牌游戏中，它显著超越了基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MuZero在完美信息游戏中表现出色，但在部分可观测、随机、多玩家环境（如卡牌游戏、自主谈判、金融交易等）中应用有限。这些环境中智能体需要对隐藏状态的不确定性进行建模，而MuZero的潜在编码缺乏专门表示未观测变量不确定性的机制。

Method: 在标准MuZero架构基础上，添加了自我条件化的辅助头用于获胜者预测和排名估计。这些目标鼓励潜在状态保留在部分可观测性下可预测结果的信息，无需显式信念状态跟踪或改变搜索算法。使用决策粒度环境、基于transformer的编码，以及具有自博弈的启发式对手课程。

Result: 在1000场头对头评估中，SkyNet达到75.3%的峰值胜率（+194 Elo，p < 10^{-50}）。对启发式对手的胜率也优于基线（0.720 vs. 0.466）。信念感知模型最初表现不如基线，但在训练吞吐量足够后显著超越，表明信念感知辅助监督在部分可观测性下改进了学习表示。

Conclusion: SkyNet成功将MuZero扩展到部分可观测、随机、多玩家环境，通过添加信念感知辅助目标改进了表示学习，无需显式信念建模。这为在需要不确定性建模的复杂领域应用基于模型的强化学习提供了新途径。

Abstract: In 2019, Google DeepMind released MuZero, a model-based reinforcement learning method that achieves strong results in perfect-information games by combining learned dynamics models with Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS). However, comparatively little work has extended MuZero to partially observable, stochastic, multi-player environments, where agents must act under uncertainty about hidden state. Such settings arise not only in card games but in domains such as autonomous negotiation, financial trading, and multi-agent robotics. In the absence of explicit belief modeling, MuZero's latent encoding has no dedicated mechanism for representing uncertainty over unobserved variables.
  To address this, we introduce SkyNet (Belief-Aware MuZero), which adds ego-conditioned auxiliary heads for winner prediction and rank estimation to the standard MuZero architecture. These objectives encourage the latent state to retain information predictive of outcomes under partial observability, without requiring explicit belief-state tracking or changes to the search algorithm.
  We evaluate SkyNet on Skyjo, a partially observable, non-zero-sum, stochastic card game, using a decision-granularity environment, transformer-based encoding, and a curriculum of heuristic opponents with self-play. In 1000-game head-to-head evaluations at matched checkpoints, SkyNet achieves a 75.3% peak win rate against the baseline (+194 Elo, $p < 10^{-50}$). SkyNet also outperforms the baseline against heuristic opponents (0.720 vs.\ 0.466 win rate). Critically, the belief-aware model initially underperforms the baseline but decisively surpasses it once training throughput is sufficient, suggesting that belief-aware auxiliary supervision improves learned representations under partial observability, but only given adequate data flow.

</details>


### [494] [PReD: An LLM-based Foundation Multimodal Model for Electromagnetic Perception, Recognition, and Decision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28183)
*Zehua Han,Jing Xiao,Yiqi Duan,Mengyu Xiang,Yuheng Ji,Xiaolong Zheng,Chenghanyu Zhang,Zhendong She,Junyu Shen,Dingwei Tan,Shichu Sun,Zhou Cong,Mingxuan Liu,Fengxiang Wang,Jinping Sun,Yangang Sun*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: PReD是首个面向电磁领域的多模态基础模型，实现了"感知-识别-决策"智能闭环，在电磁信号理解与推理方面取得SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在通用领域表现出色，但在电磁领域面临数据稀缺和领域知识整合不足的挑战，需要专门的基础模型来提升电磁信号的理解与推理能力。

Method: 构建了高质量多任务电磁数据集PReD-1.3M和评估基准PReD-Bench，采用多阶段训练策略统一多个电磁信号任务，实现从端到端信号理解到语言驱动推理决策的闭环优化。

Result: 在开源和自收集信号数据集构建的PReD-Bench上实现了最先进的性能，验证了视觉对齐基础模型在推进电磁信号理解与推理方面的可行性和潜力。

Conclusion: PReD成功展示了多模态基础模型在电磁领域的应用价值，在保持通用多模态能力的同时显著增强了电磁领域专业知识，为电磁信号智能处理提供了新范式。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models have demonstrated powerful cross-modal understanding and reasoning capabilities in general domains. However, in the electromagnetic (EM) domain, they still face challenges such as data scarcity and insufficient integration of domain knowledge. This paper proposes PReD, the first foundation model for the EM domain that covers the intelligent closed-loop of "perception, recognition, decision-making." We constructed a high-quality multitask EM dataset, PReD-1.3M, and an evaluation benchmark, PReD-Bench. The dataset encompasses multi-perspective representations such as raw time-domain waveform, frequency-domain spectrograms, and constellation diagrams, covering typical features of communication and radar signals. It supports a range of core tasks, including signal detection, modulation recognition, parameter estimation, protocol recognition, radio frequency fingerprint recognition, and anti-jamming decision-making. PReD adopts a multi-stage training strategy that unifies multiple tasks for EM signals. It achieves closed-loop optimization from end-to-end signal understanding to language-driven reasoning and decision-making, significantly enhancing EM domain expertise while maintaining general multimodal capabilities. Experimental results show that PReD achieves state-of-the-art performance on PReD-Bench constructed from both open-source and self-collected signal datasets. These results collectively validate the feasibility and potential of vision-aligned foundation models in advancing the understanding and reasoning of EM signals.

</details>


### [495] [ReCQR: Incorporating conversational query rewriting to improve Multimodal Image Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26669)
*Yuan Hu,ZhiYu Cao,PeiFeng Li,QiaoMing Zhu*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 论文提出对话式查询重写（CQR）任务，构建ReCQR数据集，通过LLM生成重写候选并筛选，显著提升图像检索准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像检索系统在处理长文本和模糊用户表达时存在困难，需要改进多模态系统中的用户查询建模。

Method: 1. 引入对话式查询重写（CQR）任务；2. 利用LLM大规模生成重写候选；3. 采用LLM-as-Judge机制结合人工审核构建ReCQR数据集（约7,000个高质量多模态对话）；4. 在ReCQR上基准测试SOTA多模态模型。

Result: CQR显著提升传统图像检索模型的准确性，为多模态系统中的用户查询建模提供新方向和见解。

Conclusion: 对话式查询重写是解决图像检索中长文本和模糊表达问题的有效方法，ReCQR数据集为相关研究提供了基准。

Abstract: With the rise of multimodal learning, image retrieval plays a crucial role in connecting visual information with natural language queries. Existing image retrievers struggle with processing long texts and handling unclear user expressions. To address these issues, we introduce the conversational query rewriting (CQR) task into the image retrieval domain and construct a dedicated multi-turn dialogue query rewriting dataset. Built on full dialogue histories, CQR rewrites users' final queries into concise, semantically complete ones that are better suited for retrieval. Specifically, We first leverage Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate rewritten candidates at scale and employ an LLM-as-Judge mechanism combined with manual review to curate approximately 7,000 high-quality multimodal dialogues, forming the ReCQR dataset. Then We benchmark several SOTA multimodal models on the ReCQR dataset to assess their performance on image retrieval. Experimental results demonstrate that CQR not only significantly enhances the accuracy of traditional image retrieval models, but also provides new directions and insights for modeling user queries in multimodal systems.

</details>


### [496] [AI Meets Mathematics Education: A Case Study on Supporting an Instructor in a Large Mathematics Class with Context-Aware AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26679)
*Jérémy Barghorn,Anna Sotnikova,Sacha Friedli,Antoine Bosselut*

Main category: cs.CY

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 研究开发了一个基于轻量级语言模型的AI系统，用于回答大学微积分课程讨论区学生问题，通过微调历史师生互动数据实现，在150个代表性问题上达到75.3%准确率，36%情况下回答质量等于或优于教师回答。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模大学课程面临提供及时、可扩展教学支持的挑战。虽然生成式AI有潜力，但其有效使用取决于可靠性和教学对齐。研究旨在探索AI辅助教学支持的实际应用。

Method: 与课程教师密切合作，开发AI系统回答学生问题。在2,588个历史师生互动数据上微调轻量级语言模型，在150个代表性问题上由5名教师标注评估。

Result: 模型在基准测试中达到75.3%准确率，36%情况下回答质量等于或优于教师回答。部署后学生调查（N=105）显示学生重视回答与课程材料的一致性及即时可用性，但仍依赖教师验证建立信任。

Conclusion: 强调混合人机工作流程对于安全有效的课程支持的重要性，展示了AI在教学支持中的实际应用潜力。

Abstract: Large-enrollment university courses face persistent challenges in providing timely and scalable instructional support. While generative AI holds promise, its effective use depends on reliability and pedagogical alignment. We present a human-centered case study of AI-assisted support in a Calculus I course, implemented in close collaboration with the course instructor. We developed a system to answer students' questions on a discussion forum, fine-tuning a lightweight language model on 2,588 historical student-instructor interactions. The model achieved 75.3% accuracy on a benchmark of 150 representative questions annotated by five instructors, and in 36% of cases, its responses were rated equal to or better than instructor answers. Post-deployment student survey (N = 105) indicated that students valued the alignment of the responses with the course materials and their immediate availability, while still relying on the instructor verification for trust. We highlight the importance of hybrid human-AI workflows for safe and effective course support.

</details>


### [497] [LITTA: Late-Interaction and Test-Time Alignment for Visually-Grounded Multimodal Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26683)
*Seonok Kim*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: LITTA：一个基于查询扩展的多模态文档检索框架，通过LLM生成查询变体，结合冻结视觉检索器和互惠排名融合，显著提升视觉丰富文档的证据页面检索效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉丰富文档（如教科书、技术报告、手册）的检索面临长上下文、复杂布局和用户问题与支持页面之间词汇重叠度低的挑战。现有方法需要重新训练检索器，成本高昂且不灵活。

Method: 提出LITTA框架：1) 使用LLM为原始查询生成互补的查询变体；2) 使用冻结的视觉检索器（带延迟交互评分）为每个变体检索候选页面；3) 通过互惠排名融合聚合候选结果，提高证据覆盖范围并减少对单一表述的敏感性。

Result: 在计算机科学、制药和工业手册三个领域的视觉基础文档检索任务上评估，多查询检索相比单查询检索在top-k准确率、召回率和MRR方面持续提升，在视觉和语义变异性高的领域增益尤其显著。准确率-效率权衡可通过查询变体数量直接控制。

Conclusion: 查询扩展为改进视觉基础多模态检索提供了简单而有效的机制，无需重新训练检索器，与现有多模态嵌入索引兼容，具有实际部署的可行性。

Abstract: Retrieving relevant evidence from visually rich documents such as textbooks, technical reports, and manuals is challenging due to long context, complex layouts, and weak lexical overlap between user questions and supporting pages. We propose LITTA, a query-expansion-centric retrieval framework for evidence page retrieval that improves multimodal document retrieval without retriever retraining. Given a user query, LITTA generates complementary query variants using a large language model and retrieves candidate pages for each variant using a frozen vision retriever with late-interaction scoring. Candidates from expanded queries are then aggregated through reciprocal rank fusion to improve evidence coverage and reduce sensitivity to any single phrasing. This simple test-time strategy significantly improves retrieval robustness while remaining compatible with existing multimodal embedding indices. We evaluate LITTA on visually grounded document retrieval tasks across three domains: computer science, pharmaceuticals, and industrial manuals. Multi-query retrieval consistently improves top-k accuracy, recall, and MRR compared to single-query retrieval, with particularly large gains in domains with high visual and semantic variability. Moreover, the accuracy-efficiency trade-off is directly controllable by the number of query variants, making LITTA practical for deployment under latency constraints. These results demonstrate that query expansion provides a simple yet effective mechanism for improving visually grounded multimodal retrieval.

</details>


### [498] [CRISP: Characterizing Relative Impact of Scholarly Publications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26791)
*Hannah Collison,Benjamin Van Durme,Daniel Khashabi*

Main category: cs.DL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: CRISP：使用大语言模型联合排名引用论文的新方法，通过随机排序和多数投票缓解位置偏差，在引用影响力分类任务上显著优于现有方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常单独分析每篇被引论文的引用上下文，这虽然关注最相关的文本，但无法进行跨所有被引论文的相对比较。作者希望开发一种能够联合评估同一篇引用文献中所有被引论文影响力的方法。

Method: 提出CRISP方法，使用大语言模型联合排名同一篇引用文献中的所有被引论文。为缓解LLM的位置偏差，对每个引用列表进行三次随机排序，并通过多数投票聚合影响力标签。这种方法利用完整的引用上下文，而不是独立评估每个引用。

Result: CRISP在人工标注的引用数据集上，比现有最佳影响力分类器准确率提升9.5%，F1分数提升8.3%。同时通过减少LLM调用次数提高效率，并与开源模型竞争性相当，实现了可扩展、成本效益高的引用影响力分析。

Conclusion: CRISP通过联合排名方法显著提升了引用影响力评估的准确性，同时保持了效率和可扩展性。作者发布了排名结果、影响力标签和代码库以支持未来研究。

Abstract: Assessing a cited paper's impact is typically done by analyzing its citation context in isolation within the citing paper. While this focuses on the most directly relevant text, it prevents relative comparisons across all the works a paper cites. We propose CRISP, which instead jointly ranks all cited papers within a citing paper using large language models (LLMs). To mitigate LLMs' positional bias, we rank each list three times in a randomized order and aggregate the impact labels through majority voting. This joint approach leverages the full citation context, rather than evaluating citations independently, to more reliably distinguish impactful references. CRISP outperforms a prior state-of-the-art impact classifier by +9.5% accuracy and +8.3% F1 on a dataset of human-annotated citations. CRISP further gains efficiency through fewer LLM calls and performs competitively with an open-source model, enabling scalable, cost-effective citation impact analysis. We release our rankings, impact labels, and codebase to support future research.

</details>


### [499] [Moving Beyond Review: Applying Language Models to Planning and Translation in Reflection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28596)
*Seyed Parsa Neshaei,Richard Lee Davis,Tanja Käser*

Main category: cs.HC

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 论文提出Pensée工具，首次将LLMs应用于反思性写作的计划和翻译阶段，基于认知过程理论，通过对话代理提供结构化反思计划支持，并自动提取关键概念辅助翻译。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 反思性写作能培养学生的元认知技能，但学生往往难以进行深度反思。现有LLMs在反思性写作中的应用主要关注文本反馈，而非计划和组织阶段的支持，效果有限。

Method: 基于认知过程理论(CPT)，开发Pensée工具：1) 在计划阶段使用对话代理提供结构化反思计划支持；2) 在翻译阶段自动提取关键概念。通过受控组间实验(N=93)评估不同写作阶段AI支持的效果。

Result: 实验结果显示：当学习者在CPT的计划和翻译阶段获得AI支持时，反思深度和结构质量显著提高，但这些效果在延迟后测中有所减弱。学习者行为和感知分析进一步揭示了CPT对齐的对话支持如何塑造反思过程和体验。

Conclusion: 研究首次将LLMs应用于反思性写作的计划和翻译阶段，为理论驱动的AI支持反思性写作提供了实证证据，展示了CPT对齐的对话支持如何有效提升反思质量。

Abstract: Reflective writing is known to support the development of students' metacognitive skills, yet learners often struggle to engage in deep reflection, limiting learning gains. Although large language models (LLMs) have been shown to improve writing skills, their use as conversational agents for reflective writing has produced mixed results and has largely focused on providing feedback on reflective texts, rather than support during planning and organizing. In this paper, inspired by the Cognitive Process Theory of writing (CPT), we propose the first application of LLMs to the planning and translation steps of reflective writing. We introduce Pensée, a tool to explore the effects of explicit AI support during these stages by scaffolding structured reflection planning using a conversational agent, and supporting translation by automatically extracting key concepts. We evaluate Pensée in a controlled between-subjects experiment (N=93), manipulating AI support across writing phases. Results show significantly greater reflection depth and structural quality when learners receive support during planning and translation stages of CPT, though these effects reduce in a delayed post-test. Analyses of learner behavior and perceptions further illustrate how CPT-aligned conversational support shapes reflection processes and learner experience, contributing empirical evidence for theory-driven uses of LLMs in AI-supported reflective writing.

</details>


### [500] [GISclaw: An Open-Source LLM-Powered Agent System for Full-Stack Geospatial Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26845)
*Jinzhen Han,JinByeong Lee,Yuri Shim,Jisung Kim,Jae-Joon Lee*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: GISclaw：一个开源的地理信息系统智能体，整合LLM推理核心与Python沙箱，支持矢量、栅格和表格数据的全栈地理空间分析，提供单/双智能体架构和多种LLM后端，在GeoAnalystBench基准上达到96%任务成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM驱动的GIS智能体存在数据类型覆盖有限（仅矢量）、依赖专有GIS平台、单模型架构无法进行系统比较等问题。需要开发一个开源、全面、可比较的GIS分析智能体系统。

Method: 1. 系统架构：LLM推理核心 + 持久Python沙箱 + 开源GIS库（GeoPandas, rasterio等）+ 基于Web的交互界面
2. 两种可插拔智能体架构：单智能体ReAct循环和双智能体计划-执行-重规划管道
3. 支持六种异构LLM后端：从云端旗舰模型到本地部署的14B参数模型
4. 三大工程创新：模式分析（弥合任务-数据信息鸿沟）、领域知识注入、错误记忆机制

Result: 1. 在50个任务的GeoAnalystBench基准上达到96%的任务成功率
2. 通过600个模型-架构-任务组合的系统评估发现：双智能体架构会降低强模型性能，仅对弱模型有边际增益
3. 提出了包含代码结构分析、推理过程评估和类型特定输出验证的三层评估协议

Conclusion: GISclaw成功构建了一个开源、全面的GIS分析智能体系统，解决了现有系统的局限性。系统支持多种数据类型的全栈分析，提供了可比较的智能体架构，并通过创新的工程方法实现了高任务成功率。

Abstract: The convergence of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Geographic Information Science has opened new avenues for automating complex geospatial analysis. However, existing LLM-powered GIS agents are constrained by limited data-type coverage (vector-only), reliance on proprietary GIS platforms, and single-model architectures that preclude systematic comparisons. We present GISclaw, an open-source agent system that integrates an LLM reasoning core with a persistent Python sandbox, a comprehensive suite of open-source GIS libraries (GeoPandas, rasterio, scipy, scikit-learn), and a web-based interactive interface for full-stack geospatial analysis spanning vector, raster, and tabular data. GISclaw implements two pluggable agent architectures -- a Single Agent ReAct loop and a Dual Agent Plan-Execute-Replan pipeline -- and supports six heterogeneous LLM backends ranging from cloud-hosted flagship models (GPT-5.4) to locally deployed 14B models on consumer GPUs. Through three key engineering innovations -- Schema Analysis bridging the task-data information gap, Domain Knowledge injection for domain-specific workflows, and an Error Memory mechanism for intelligent self-correction -- GISclaw achieves up to 96% task success on the 50-task GeoAnalystBench benchmark. Systematic evaluation across 600 model--architecture--task combinations reveals that the Dual Agent architecture consistently degrades strong models while providing marginal gains for weaker ones. We further propose a three-layer evaluation protocol incorporating code structure analysis, reasoning process assessment, and type-specific output verification for comprehensive GIS agent assessment. The system and all evaluation code are publicly available.

</details>


### [501] [Unsupervised Evaluation of Deep Audio Embeddings for Music Structure Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27218)
*Axel Marmoret*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种无监督方法，评估9个开源预训练音频模型在音乐结构分析中的表现，使用三种无监督分割算法，发现现代深度嵌入通常优于传统频谱图基线，CBM算法表现最佳，并指出标准评估指标存在人为膨胀问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前音乐结构分析（MSA）的先进方法主要基于监督深度学习，但面临两个主要瓶颈：1）需要大量标注数据，2）音乐结构本身存在固有模糊性。研究者希望探索无监督方法是否能克服这些限制。

Method: 1）评估9个开源通用预训练深度音频模型；2）提取小节级别的嵌入表示；3）使用三种无监督分割算法进行边界检测：Foote棋盘核方法、谱聚类、相关块匹配（CBM）；4）专注于边界检索任务；5）提出"修剪"和"双重修剪"标注方法以改进评估标准。

Result: 1）现代通用深度嵌入通常优于传统频谱图基线，但并非系统性优势；2）无监督边界估计方法通常比最近的线性探测基线表现更好；3）CBM算法在所有评估技术中始终是最有效的下游分割方法；4）标准评估指标存在人为膨胀问题。

Conclusion: 无监督方法在音乐结构分析中具有潜力，CBM算法表现优异，但需要改进评估标准以避免指标膨胀。建议系统采用"修剪"或"双重修剪"标注来建立更严格的MSA评估标准。

Abstract: Music Structure Analysis (MSA) aims to uncover the high-level organization of musical pieces. State-of-the-art methods are often based on supervised deep learning, but these methods are bottlenecked by the need for heavily annotated data and inherent structural ambiguities. In this paper, we propose an unsupervised evaluation of nine open-source, generic pre-trained deep audio models, on MSA. For each model, we extract barwise embeddings and segment them using three unsupervised segmentation algorithms (Foote's checkerboard kernels, spectral clustering, and Correlation Block-Matching (CBM)), focusing exclusively on boundary retrieval. Our results demonstrate that modern, generic deep embeddings generally outperform traditional spectrogram-based baselines, but not systematically. Furthermore, our unsupervised boundary estimation methodology generally yields stronger performance than recent linear probing baselines. Among the evaluated techniques, the CBM algorithm consistently emerges as the most effective downstream segmentation method. Finally, we highlight the artificial inflation of standard evaluation metrics and advocate for the systematic adoption of ``trimming'', or even ``double trimming'' annotations to establish more rigorous MSA evaluation standards.

</details>


### [502] [A Multi-agent AI System for Deep Learning Model Migration from TensorFlow to JAX](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27296)
*Stoyan Nikolov,Bernhard Konrad,Moritz Gronbach,Niket Kumar,Ann Yan,Varun Singh,Yaning Liang,Parthasarathy Ranganathan*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: Google开发了一个基于AI的多智能体系统，用于将TensorFlow深度学习模型自动迁移到JAX框架，实现了6.4-8倍的加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI产品和模型的快速发展，深度学习框架不断更新。Google在众多产品中使用机器学习，但维护不同ML框架和版本的模型源代码是一个重大挑战。目前迁移工作主要依赖人工专家手动完成，效率低下。

Method: 构建了一个基于AI的多智能体系统：1) 使用静态分析和AI指令的AI规划器创建复杂代码组件的迁移计划；2) 定义质量指标和基于AI的评估器，在没有测试的情况下确保代码符合严格风格和依赖要求；3) 使用编排器和编码器执行迁移计划，基于AI生成的示例剧本。

Result: 在大型超大规模环境中，该系统将深度学习模型迁移时间减少了6.4-8倍，显著加速了商业实际用例的代码迁移。

Conclusion: 该方法创建了一个良性循环，AI支持自身开发工作流程。所描述的技术和方法可以推广到其他框架迁移和一般代码转换任务。

Abstract: The rapid development of AI-based products and their underlying models has led to constant innovation in deep learning frameworks. Google has been pioneering machine learning usage across dozens of products. Maintaining the multitude of model source codes in different ML frameworks and versions is a significant challenge. So far the maintenance and migration work was done largely manually by human experts. We describe an AI-based multi-agent system that we built to support automatic migration of TensorFlow-based deep learning models into JAX-based ones. We make three main contributions: First, we show how an AI planner that uses a mix of static analysis with AI instructions can create migration plans for very complex code components that are reliably followed by the combination of an orchestrator and coders, using AI-generated example-based playbooks. Second, we define quality metrics and AI-based judges that accelerate development when the code to evaluate has no tests and has to adhere to strict style and dependency requirements. Third, we demonstrate how the system accelerates code migrations in a large hyperscaler environment on commercial real-world use-cases. Our approach dramatically reduces the time (6.4x-8x speedup) for deep learning model migrations and creates a virtuous circle where effectively AI supports its own development workflow. We expect that the techniques and approaches described here can be generalized for other framework migrations and general code transformation tasks.

</details>


### [503] [Agent-Driven Autonomous Reinforcement Learning Research: Iterative Policy Improvement for Quadruped Locomotion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27416)
*Nimesh Khandelwal,Shakti S. Gupta*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文记录了一个四足机器人运动控制的智能体驱动自主强化学习研究案例。人类通过智能体编码环境提供高层指导，智能体执行大部分研究循环：读取代码、诊断故障、编辑奖励和地形配置、启动监控任务、分析中间指标、提出下一轮实验。在70多个实验中，智能体将平均奖励从约7提升到最佳运行（速度误差0.263，97%超时率）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索在机器人强化学习领域中，智能体能否自主执行迭代研究循环，包括实验管理、故障诊断和实验设计，同时评估人类指导在其中的作用。

Method: 采用智能体驱动的自主强化学习方法，人类提供高层指令，智能体执行完整的研究循环：代码阅读、故障诊断、奖励和地形配置编辑、任务启动监控、中间指标分析、下一轮实验设计。在Isaac Lab中使用DHAV1 12-DoF四足机器人进行14轮70多个实验。

Result: 智能体成功将性能从早期粗糙地形运行（平均奖励约7）提升到最佳Wave 12运行（exp063，速度误差0.263，97%超时率），并在不同GPU上独立复现5次。智能体自主做出多项研究决策：隔离PhysX死锁问题、移植奖励项、修复导入问题、减少环境数量、终止挂起运行、调整研究方向。

Conclusion: 研究表明智能体能够在机器人强化学习领域中实质性执行迭代研究循环，仅需有限的人类干预。同时明确指出了人类指导在议程设定中的持续重要性，特别是在故障频发的机器人RL设置中。

Abstract: This paper documents a case study in agent-driven autonomous reinforcement learning research for quadruped locomotion. The setting was not a fully self-starting research system. A human provided high-level directives through an agentic coding environment, while an agent carried out most of the execution loop: reading code, diagnosing failures, editing reward and terrain configurations, launching and monitoring jobs, analyzing intermediate metrics, and proposing the next wave of experiments. Across more than 70 experiments organized into fourteen waves on a DHAV1 12-DoF quadruped in Isaac Lab, the agent progressed from early rough-terrain runs with mean reward around 7 to a best logged Wave 12 run, exp063, with velocity error 0.263 and 97\% timeout over 2000 iterations, independently reproduced five times across different GPUs. The archive also records several concrete autonomous research decisions: isolating PhysX deadlocks to terrain sets containing boxes and stair-like primitives, porting four reward terms from openly available reference implementations \cite{deeprobotics, rlsar}, correcting Isaac Sim import and bootstrapping issues, reducing environment count for diagnosis, terminating hung runs, and pivoting effort away from HIM after repeated terrain=0.0 outcomes. Relative to the AutoResearch paradigm \cite{autoresearch}, this case study operates in a more failure-prone robotics RL setting with multi-GPU experiment management and simulator-specific engineering constraints. The contribution is empirical and documentary: it shows that an agent can materially execute the iterative RL research loop in this domain with limited human intervention, while also making clear where human direction still shaped the agenda.

</details>


### [504] [ImagenWorld: Stress-Testing Image Generation Models with Explainable Human Evaluation on Open-ended Real-World Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27862)
*Samin Mahdizadeh Sani,Max Ku,Nima Jamali,Matina Mahdizadeh Sani,Paria Khoshtab,Wei-Chieh Sun,Parnian Fazel,Zhi Rui Tam,Thomas Chong,Edisy Kin Wai Chan,Donald Wai Tong Tsang,Chiao-Wei Hsu,Ting Wai Lam,Ho Yin Sam Ng,Chiafeng Chu,Chak-Wing Mak,Keming Wu,Hiu Tung Wong,Yik Chun Ho,Chi Ruan,Zhuofeng Li,I-Sheng Fang,Shih-Ying Yeh,Ho Kei Cheng,Ping Nie,Wenhu Chen*

Main category: cs.GR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: ImagenWorld是一个全面的图像生成与编辑基准测试，包含3.6K条件集、6个核心任务和6个领域，通过20K细粒度人工标注和可解释评估方案，评估了14个模型并揭示了关键发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像生成基准测试存在局限性：要么专注于孤立任务，要么覆盖领域狭窄，或者提供不透明的评分而无法解释失败模式。需要更全面、可解释的基准来推动图像生成技术的发展。

Method: 构建了包含3.6K条件集的基准测试，涵盖6个核心任务（生成和编辑，单/多参考）和6个领域（艺术作品、照片级图像、信息图表、文本图形、计算机图形、截图）。采用20K细粒度人工标注和可解释评估方案，标记局部对象级和片段级错误，辅以自动VLM指标。

Result: 评估14个模型发现：(1)编辑任务比生成任务更困难，特别是局部编辑；(2)模型在艺术和照片级领域表现优秀，但在符号和文本密集领域（如截图和信息图表）表现不佳；(3)闭源系统整体领先，但针对性数据管理（如Qwen-Image）在文本密集情况下缩小差距；(4)VLM指标Kendall准确率最高达0.79，接近人类排名，但在细粒度错误归因方面不足。

Conclusion: ImagenWorld提供了一个严谨的基准测试和诊断工具，用于推动鲁棒图像生成技术的发展，填补了现有基准在全面性、可解释性和细粒度评估方面的空白。

Abstract: Advances in diffusion, autoregressive, and hybrid models have enabled high-quality image synthesis for tasks such as text-to-image, editing, and reference-guided composition. Yet, existing benchmarks remain limited, either focus on isolated tasks, cover only narrow domains, or provide opaque scores without explaining failure modes. We introduce \textbf{ImagenWorld}, a benchmark of 3.6K condition sets spanning six core tasks (generation and editing, with single or multiple references) and six topical domains (artworks, photorealistic images, information graphics, textual graphics, computer graphics, and screenshots). The benchmark is supported by 20K fine-grained human annotations and an explainable evaluation schema that tags localized object-level and segment-level errors, complementing automated VLM-based metrics. Our large-scale evaluation of 14 models yields several insights: (1) models typically struggle more in editing tasks than in generation tasks, especially in local edits. (2) models excel in artistic and photorealistic settings but struggle with symbolic and text-heavy domains such as screenshots and information graphics. (3) closed-source systems lead overall, while targeted data curation (e.g., Qwen-Image) narrows the gap in text-heavy cases. (4) modern VLM-based metrics achieve Kendall accuracies up to 0.79, approximating human ranking, but fall short of fine-grained, explainable error attribution. ImagenWorld provides both a rigorous benchmark and a diagnostic tool to advance robust image generation.

</details>


### [505] [RAD-LAD: Rule and Language Grounded Autonomous Driving in Real-Time](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28522)
*Anurag Ghosh,Srinivasa Narasimhan,Manmohan Chandraker,Francesco Pittaluga*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: LAD是一个实时语言-动作规划器，具有可中断架构，能以~20Hz生成运动规划或以~10Hz生成文本推理和运动规划。RAD是基于规则的规划器，用于解决PDM-Closed的结构限制。两者结合的混合系统在nuPlan基准测试中达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动机是开发一个实时、低延迟的自动驾驶规划系统，结合语言模型的适应性和可解释性优势与规则系统的可靠性。现有语言模型在自动驾驶规划中延迟较高，而纯规则系统缺乏适应性。

Method: 1. LAD：采用可中断架构，单次前向传播生成运动规划（~20Hz）或同时生成文本推理和运动规划（~10Hz）。2. RAD：基于规则的规划器，专门解决PDM-Closed的结构限制。3. 混合规划：结合LAD和RAD的优势。

Result: 1. LAD延迟比现有驾驶语言模型低约3倍，在nuPlan Test14-Hard和InterPlan上达到学习型方法的SOTA。2. RAD在基于规则的规划器中达到SOTA性能。3. 混合系统证明规则和学习具有互补能力：规则支持可靠操控，语言支持自适应和可解释决策。

Conclusion: 规则和学习在自动驾驶规划中具有互补优势，混合方法能同时实现可靠性和适应性。LAD的低延迟架构使其适合实时闭环部署。

Abstract: We present LAD, a real-time language--action planner with an interruptible architecture that produces a motion plan in a single forward pass (~20 Hz) or generates textual reasoning alongside a motion plan (~10 Hz). LAD is fast enough for real-time closed-loop deployment, achieving ~3x lower latency than prior driving language models while setting a new learning-based state of the art on nuPlan Test14-Hard and InterPlan. We also introduce RAD, a rule-based planner designed to address structural limitations of PDM-Closed. RAD achieves state-of-the-art performance among rule-based planners on nuPlan Test14-Hard and InterPlan. Finally, we show that combining RAD and LAD enables hybrid planning that captures the strengths of both approaches. This hybrid system demonstrates that rules and learning provide complementary capabilities: rules support reliable maneuvering, while language enables adaptive and explainable decision-making.

</details>


### [506] [Complementarity-Preserving Generative Theory for Multimodal ECG Synthesis: A Quantum-Inspired Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26695)
*Timothy Oladunni,Farouk Ganiyu-Adewumi,Clyde Baidoo,Kyndal Maclin*

Main category: eess.SP

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了互补性保持生成理论(CPGT)和量子启发生成框架Q-CFD-GAN，用于生成生理一致的多模态心电图数据，通过保持跨域互补性而非独立合成各模态来提升合成数据的生理有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成模型通常独立合成心电图的时间、频率和时频表示等模态，导致合成数据在视觉上合理但跨域生理不一致。需要一种能够保持跨域互补性的生成方法，以生成生理有效的多模态信号。

Method: 提出互补性保持生成理论(CPGT)，并实例化为Q-CFD-GAN框架：在复数潜在空间中建模多模态心电图结构，通过互补性感知约束调节互信息、冗余度和形态一致性。

Result: Q-CFD-GAN将潜在嵌入方差降低82%，分类器可信度误差降低26.6%，将三域互补性从0.56恢复到0.91，同时实现最低的形态偏差(3.8%)。

Conclusion: 保持多模态信息几何结构而非仅优化模态特定保真度，对于生成生理有意义且适用于下游临床机器学习应用的合成心电图信号至关重要。

Abstract: Multimodal deep learning has substantially improved electrocardiogram (ECG) classification by jointly leveraging time, frequency, and time-frequency representations. However, existing generative models typically synthesize these modalities independently, resulting in synthetic ECG data that are visually plausible yet physiologically inconsistent across domains. This work establishes a Complementarity-Preserving Generative Theory (CPGT), which posits that physiologically valid multimodal signal generation requires explicit preservation of cross-domain complementarity rather than loosely coupled modality synthesis. We instantiate CPGT through Q-CFD-GAN, a quantum-inspired generative framework that models multimodal ECG structure within a complex-valued latent space and enforces complementarity-aware constraints regulating mutual information, redundancy, and morphological coherence. Experimental evaluation demonstrates that Q-CFD-GAN reduces latent embedding variance by 82%, decreases classifier-based plausibility error by 26.6%, and restores tri-domain complementarity from 0.56 to 0.91, while achieving the lowest observed morphology deviation (3.8%). These findings show that preserving multimodal information geometry, rather than optimizing modality-specific fidelity alone, is essential for generating synthetic ECG signals that remain physiologically meaningful and suitable for downstream clinical machine-learning applications.

</details>


### [507] [SutureAgent: Learning Surgical Trajectories via Goal-conditioned Offline RL in Pixel Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26720)
*Huanrong Liu,Chunlin Tian,Tongyu Jia,Tailai Zhou,Qin Liu,Yu Gao,Yutong Ban,Yun Gu,Guy Rosman,Xin Ma,Qingbiao Li*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: SutureAgent：基于离线强化学习的端到端手术针轨迹预测框架，将针尖视为像素空间中的智能体进行序列决策，通过稀疏标注生成密集奖励信号，在肾脏伤口缝合数据集上显著优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法直接从视觉观测学习运动分布时忽略了相邻运动步骤之间的序列依赖性，且稀疏路径点标注提供的监督不足，增加了监督学习或模仿学习的难度。需要一种能捕捉针运动连续性并显式建模物理合理像素级状态转移的方法。

Method: 将基于图像的针轨迹预测建模为序列决策问题，将针尖视为在像素空间中逐步移动的智能体。提出SutureAgent：目标条件离线强化学习框架，通过三次样条插值将稀疏标注转化为密集奖励信号；使用观察编码器编码变长视频片段以捕捉局部空间线索和长程时间动态；通过离散方向+连续幅度的动作自回归预测未来路径点；采用带行为克隆正则化的保守Q学习进行稳定的离线策略优化。

Result: 在包含50名患者1,158条轨迹的新肾脏伤口缝合数据集上，SutureAgent将平均位移误差降低了58.6%，显著优于最强基线方法，证明了将针轨迹预测建模为像素级序列动作学习的有效性。

Conclusion: 将针轨迹预测建模为像素级序列决策问题能有效捕捉运动连续性，离线强化学习框架能利用稀疏专家指导探索合理未来运动路径，为机器人辅助缝合提供了更准确、物理合理的轨迹预测方法。

Abstract: Predicting surgical needle trajectories from endoscopic video is critical for robot-assisted suturing, enabling anticipatory planning, real-time guidance, and safer motion execution. Existing methods that directly learn motion distributions from visual observations tend to overlook the sequential dependency among adjacent motion steps. Moreover, sparse waypoint annotations often fail to provide sufficient supervision, further increasing the difficulty of supervised or imitation learning methods. To address these challenges, we formulate image-based needle trajectory prediction as a sequential decision-making problem, in which the needle tip is treated as an agent that moves step by step in pixel space. This formulation naturally captures the continuity of needle motion and enables the explicit modeling of physically plausible pixel-wise state transitions over time. From this perspective, we propose SutureAgent, a goal-conditioned offline reinforcement learning framework that leverages sparse annotations to dense reward signals via cubic spline interpolation, encouraging the policy to exploit limited expert guidance while exploring plausible future motion paths. SutureAgent encodes variable-length clips using an observation encoder to capture both local spatial cues and long-range temporal dynamics, and autoregressively predicts future waypoints through actions composed of discrete directions and continuous magnitudes. To enable stable offline policy optimization from expert demonstrations, we adopt Conservative Q-Learning with Behavioral Cloning regularization. Experiments on a new kidney wound suturing dataset containing 1,158 trajectories from 50 patients show that SutureAgent reduces Average Displacement Error by 58.6% compared with the strongest baseline, demonstrating the effectiveness of modeling needle trajectory prediction as pixel-level sequential action learning.

</details>


### [508] [MOSS-VoiceGenerator: Create Realistic Voices with Natural Language Descriptions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28086)
*Kexin Huang,Liwei Fan,Botian Jiang,Yaozhou Jiang,Qian Tu,Jie Zhu,Yuqian Zhang,Yiwei Zhao,Chenchen Yang,Zhaoye Fei,Shimin Li,Xiaogui Yang,Qinyuan Cheng,Xipeng Qiu*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: MOSS-VoiceGenerator是一个开源指令驱动的语音生成模型，能够直接从自然语言提示创建新的音色，在真实世界语音数据上训练以产生更自然的语音。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前语音设计模型主要在精心录制的录音室数据上训练，产生的语音虽然清晰但缺乏真实人类语音的生活化特质。作者假设接触真实世界的声学变化能产生感知上更自然的语音。

Method: 提出MOSS-VoiceGenerator，一个开源指令驱动的语音生成模型，在来自电影内容的大规模表达性语音数据上进行训练。

Result: 主观偏好研究表明，该模型在整体性能、指令跟随和自然度方面优于其他语音设计模型。

Conclusion: 通过使用真实世界表达性语音数据进行训练，可以创建更自然、更具表现力的语音生成模型，提升语音设计的质量和实用性。

Abstract: Voice design from natural language aims to generate speaker timbres directly from free-form textual descriptions, allowing users to create voices tailored to specific roles, personalities, and emotions. Such controllable voice creation benefits a wide range of downstream applications-including storytelling, game dubbing, role-play agents, and conversational assistants, making it a significant task for modern Text-to-Speech models. However, existing models are largely trained on carefully recorded studio data, which produces speech that is clean and well-articulated, yet lacks the lived-in qualities of real human voices. To address these limitations, we present MOSS-VoiceGenerator, an open-source instruction-driven voice generation model that creates new timbres directly from natural language prompts. Motivated by the hypothesis that exposure to real-world acoustic variation produces more perceptually natural voices, we train on large-scale expressive speech data sourced from cinematic content. Subjective preference studies demonstrate its superiority in overall performance, instruction-following, and naturalness compared to other voice design models.

</details>


### [509] [ASTER -- Agentic Science Toolkit for Exoplanet Research](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26953)
*Emilie Panek,Alexander Roman,Gaurav Shukla,Leonardo Pagliaro,Katia Matcheva,Konstantin Matchev*

Main category: astro-ph.EP

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: ASTER是一个基于大语言模型的智能科学工具包，专门用于系外行星研究，通过LLM代理协调领域特定工具，实现系外行星大气表征的自动化工作流程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 系外行星观测数据的快速增长需要灵活、易用的分析工作流程。传统分析方法需要结合档案查询、文献检索、辐射传输模型和贝叶斯反演框架等多种专业工具，对研究人员的技术要求很高。大语言模型的出现使得通过AI代理协调执行复杂多步骤任务成为可能。

Method: 开发ASTER（Agentic Science Toolkit for Exoplanet Research）框架，将LLM能力引入系外行星研究社区。该框架支持：1）LLM驱动的领域特定工具交互；2）工作流程规划和管理；3）常见数据分析任务支持。目前集成了NASA系外行星档案数据下载、TauREx辐射传输模型生成透射光谱、以及TauREx贝叶斯参数反演等工具。

Result: 通过WASP-39b的完整案例研究展示了ASTER的工作流程，代理能够高效地在不同数据集间切换，生成适当的正向模型光谱并执行参数反演。ASTER为系外行星大气表征提供了一个统一平台。

Conclusion: ASTER成功地将LLM代理技术应用于系外行星研究，通过工具集成和工作流程自动化简化了复杂的数据分析过程。持续开发和社区贡献将扩展ASTER在系外行星研究中的更广泛应用。

Abstract: The expansion of exoplanet observations has created a need for flexible, accessible, and user-friendly workflows. Transmission spectroscopy has become a key technique for probing atmospheric composition of transiting exoplanets. The analyses of these data require the combination of archival queries, literature search, the use of radiative transfer models, and Bayesian retrieval frameworks, each demanding specialized expertise. Modern large language models enable the coordinated execution of complex, multi-step tasks by AI agents with tool integration, structured prompts, and iterative reasoning. In this study we present ASTER, an Agentic Science Toolkit for Exoplanet Research. ASTER is an orchestration framework that brings LLM capability to the exoplanetary community by enabling LLM-driven interaction with integrated domain-specific tools, workflow planning and management, and support for common data analysis tasks. Currently ASTER incorporates tools for downloading planetary parameters and observational datasets from the NASA Exoplanet Archive, as well as the generation of transit spectra from the TauREx radiative transfer model, and the completion of Bayesian retrieval of planetary parameters with TauREx. Beyond tool integration, the agent assists users by proposing alternative modeling approaches, reporting potential issues and suggesting solutions, and interpretations. We demonstrate ASTER's workflow through a complete case study of WASP-39b, performing multiple retrievals using observational data available on the archive. The agent efficiently transitions between datasets, generates appropriate forward model spectra and performs retrievals. ASTER provides a unified platform for the characterization of exoplanet atmospheres. Ongoing development and community contributions will continue expanding ASTER's capabilities toward broader applications in exoplanet research.

</details>


### [510] [Voice-based debate with an AI adversary is associated with increased divergent ideation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27073)
*Neelam Modi Jain,Dan J. Wang*

Main category: cs.HC

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 研究发现，与生成式AI交互导致人类认知同质化的担忧可能更多源于文本交互模式本身，而非AI系统。通过分析957场大学生与AI对手的辩论，发现语音交互比文本交互更冗长、重复，但这种冗余有助于探索更广泛的概念，而文本交互则偏向简洁但限制概念广度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前关于生成式AI可能导致人类认知同质化的担忧主要基于文本交互证据，这可能混淆了AI系统效应与书面交流模式的影响。本研究旨在探究这些模式是否取决于交流模态而非AI本身。

Method: 分析了957场大学生与知识渊博的AI对手之间的开放式辩论，比较语音和文本两种交互模态下的对话结构模式。基于口语与书面语的传统区分理论框架，量化分析了冗余度、重复性、概念广度等指标。

Result: 语音交互显著更冗长，表现出更多的词语和短语重复，但这种冗余具有功能性：语音用户依赖重复性表达来保持连贯性，同时探索更广泛的概念范围。文本交互则偏向简洁和精炼，但限制了概念广度。

Conclusion: 归因于生成式AI的认知限制可能部分反映了访问AI的媒介特性。语音交互通过冗余促进概念探索，而文本交互的简洁性可能限制思维广度，这表明模态选择对AI交互的认知影响至关重要。

Abstract: Concerns that interacting with generative AI homogenizes human cognition are largely based on evidence from text-based interactions, potentially conflating the effects of AI systems with those of written communication. This study examines whether these patterns depend on communication modality rather than on AI itself. Analyzing 957 open-ended debates between university students and a knowledgeable AI adversary, we show that modality corresponds to distinct structural patterns in discourse. Consistent with classic distinctions between orality and literacy, spoken interactions are significantly more verbose and exhibit greater repetition of words and phrases than text-based exchanges. This redundancy, however, is functional: voice users rely on recurrent phrasing to maintain coherence while exploring a wider range of ideas. In contrast, text-based interaction favors concision and refinement but constrains conceptual breadth. These findings suggest that perceived cognitive limitations attributed to generative AI partly reflect the medium through which it is accessed.

</details>


### [511] [Amalgam: Hybrid LLM-PGM Synthesis Algorithm for Accuracy and Realism](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27254)
*Antheas Kapenekakis,Bent Thomsen,Katja Hose,Michele Albano*

Main category: cs.DB

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: Amalgam是一种混合LLM-PGM数据合成算法，结合了概率图模型和大型语言模型的优势，支持复杂模式同时保持数据分布质量，适用于高级分析和隐私保护。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前合成数据生成方法存在局限性：概率图模型（PGMs）能生成适合高级分析的数据但无法处理复杂模式，而大型语言模型（LLMs）能处理复杂模式但生成的数据分布存在偏差。需要一种能同时支持高级分析、真实性和隐私保护的方法。

Method: 提出Amalgam混合算法，结合LLM和PGM的优势。LLM处理复杂模式结构，PGM确保数据分布质量。通过这种混合方法实现既能处理复杂数据集结构，又能保持统计分布特性的数据合成。

Result: Amalgam在χ²检验中平均P值达到91%，在真实性评估中获得3.8/5分（最先进方法为3.3分，真实数据为4.7分），显著优于现有方法。

Conclusion: Amalgam成功解决了现有合成数据生成方法的局限性，为需要复杂模式支持、高质量数据分布和隐私保护的领域（如医疗健康）提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: To generate synthetic datasets, e.g., in domains such as healthcare, the literature proposes approaches of two main types: Probabilistic Graphical Models (PGMs) and Deep Learning models, such as LLMs. While PGMs produce synthetic data that can be used for advanced analytics, they do not support complex schemas and datasets. LLMs on the other hand, support complex schemas but produce skewed dataset distributions, which are less useful for advanced analytics. In this paper, we therefore present Amalgam, a hybrid LLM-PGM data synthesis algorithm supporting both advanced analytics, realism, and tangible privacy properties. We show that Amalgam synthesizes data with an average 91 % $χ^2 P$ value and scores 3.8/5 for realism using our proposed metric, where state-of-the-art is 3.3 and real data is 4.7.

</details>


### [512] [Copilot-Assisted Second-Thought Framework for Brain-to-Robot Hand Motion Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27492)
*Yizhe Li,Shixiao Wang,Jian K. Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出CNN-注意力混合模型用于从EEG解码手部运动学，扩展到EEG-EMG多模态解码，并引入copilot框架通过运动状态感知critic提升轨迹保真度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 运动运动学预测（MKP）是开发运动相关脑机接口的重要领域。传统方法主要依赖CNN或RNN，而Transformer在处理长序列EEG数据方面表现出色。本研究旨在开发更有效的EEG解码方法，并探索多模态融合提升性能。

Method: 1) 提出CNN-注意力混合模型解码手部运动学；2) 扩展到EEG-EMG多模态解码；3) 引入copilot框架，使用运动状态感知critic在有限状态机中过滤低置信度解码点；4) 在MuJoCo仿真中控制Franka Panda机械臂。

Result: 单被试测试在X、Y、Z轴上分别获得0.9854、0.9946和0.9065的PCC值；跨被试测试结果为0.9643、0.9795和0.5852。copilot框架将EEG-only解码的总体PCC提升至0.93，同时排除少于20%的数据点。

Conclusion: CNN-注意力混合模型在EEG运动学解码中表现优异，EEG-EMG多模态融合显著提升性能，copilot框架有效提高轨迹保真度，为脑机接口控制提供可靠解决方案。

Abstract: Motor kinematics prediction (MKP) from electroencephalography (EEG) is an important research area for developing movement-related brain-computer interfaces (BCIs). While traditional methods often rely on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) or recurrent neural networks (RNNs), Transformer-based models have shown strong ability in modeling long sequential EEG data. In this study, we propose a CNN-attention hybrid model for decoding hand kinematics from EEG during grasp-and-lift tasks, achieving strong performance in within-subject experiments. We further extend this approach to EEG-EMG multimodal decoding, which yields substantially improved results. Within-subject tests achieve PCC values of 0.9854, 0.9946, and 0.9065 for the X, Y, and Z axes, respectively, computed on the midpoint trajectory between the thumb and index finger, while cross-subject tests result in 0.9643, 0.9795, and 0.5852. The decoded trajectories from both modalities are then used to control a Franka Panda robotic arm in a MuJoCo simulation. To enhance trajectory fidelity, we introduce a copilot framework that filters low-confidence decoded points using a motion-state-aware critic within a finite-state machine. This post-processing step improves the overall within-subject PCC of EEG-only decoding to 0.93 while excluding fewer than 20% of the data points.

</details>


### [513] [InnerPond: Fostering Inter-Self Dialogue with a Multi-Agent Approach for Introspection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27563)
*Hayeon Jeon,Dakyeom Ahn,Sunyu Pang,Yunseo Choi,Suhwoo Yoon,Joonhwan Lee,Eun-mee Kim,Hajin Lim*

Main category: cs.HC

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: InnerPond是一个基于对话自我理论的多智能体系统，将内部视角（价值观、关切、抱负）表示为不同的LLM智能体，通过空间隐喻和对话编排支持内省探索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大多数数字工具将自我视为统一实体，而对话自我理论认为自我由多个内部视角组成，这些视角可能相互冲突或对话。研究旨在探索如何利用AI系统支持这种多元自我的内省过程。

Method: 设计了InnerPond研究探针，采用多智能体系统架构，将内部视角表示为独立的LLM智能体。通过迭代探索空间隐喻、交互脚手架和对话编排，创建了用于组织和关联多个内部视角的共享空间环境。在17名面临职业选择的年轻人中进行用户研究。

Result: 参与者通过与AI共同创建内在声音、构建关系性内在景观、作为观察者和调解者编排对话等方式与探针互动。研究提供了关于此类系统如何支持内省的见解，并为AI支持的内省工具提供了设计启示。

Conclusion: 这项工作为支持探索自我多元性的AI内省工具提供了设计启示，展示了多智能体系统在支持复杂内省过程中的潜力。

Abstract: Introspection is central to identity construction and future planning, yet most digital tools approach the self as a unified entity. In contrast, Dialogical Self Theory (DST) views the self as composed of multiple internal perspectives, such as values, concerns, and aspirations, that can come into tension or dialogue with one another. Building on this view, we designed InnerPond, a research probe in the form of a multi-agent system that represents these internal perspectives as distinct LLM-based agents for introspection. Its design was shaped through iterative explorations of spatial metaphors, interaction scaffolding, and conversational orchestration, culminating in a shared spatial environment for organizing and relating multiple inner perspectives. In a user study with 17 young adults navigating career choices, participants engaged with the probe by co-creating inner voices with AI, composing relational inner landscapes, and orchestrating dialogue as observers and mediators, offering insight into how such systems could support introspection. Overall, this work offers design implications for AI-supported introspection tools that enable exploration of the self's multiplicity.

</details>


### [514] [ProgressVLA: Progress-Guided Diffusion Policy for Vision-Language Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27670)
*Hongyu Yan,Qiwei Li,Jiaolong Yang,Yadong Mu*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出VLA模型，通过进度估计和可微分进度指导改进机器人操作任务，在长视野任务中显著提升成功率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型缺乏进度感知能力，依赖手工启发式规则进行任务终止判断，这在涉及级联子目标的长视野任务中尤为严重

Method: 1) 在大规模无监督视频-文本机器人数据集上预训练进度估计器；2) 引入逆动力学世界模型，将预测的动作token映射到未来潜在视觉状态，通过进度估计器和最大进度正则化建立可微分管道，提供进度引导的动作token优化

Result: 在CALVIN和LIBERO基准测试以及真实机器人部署中，相比强基线方法在成功率和泛化能力上取得显著提升

Conclusion: 通过集成进度估计和可微分进度指导，显著提高了VLA模型在机器人操作任务中的性能，特别是在长视野任务中

Abstract: Most existing vision-language-action (VLA) models for robotic manipulation lack progress awareness, typically relying on hand-crafted heuristics for task termination. This limitation is particularly severe in long-horizon tasks involving cascaded sub-goals. In this work, we investigate the estimation and integration of task progress, proposing a novel model named {\textbf \vla}. Our technical contributions are twofold: (1) \emph{robust progress estimation}: We pre-train a progress estimator on large-scale, unsupervised video-text robotic datasets. This estimator achieves a low prediction residual (0.07 on a scale of $[0, 1]$) in simulation and demonstrates zero-shot generalization to unseen real-world samples, and (2) \emph{differentiable progress guidance}: We introduce an inverse dynamics world model that maps predicted action tokens into future latent visual states. These latents are then processed by the progress estimator; by applying a maximal progress regularization, we establish a differentiable pipeline that provides progress-piloted guidance to refine action tokens. Extensive experiments on the CALVIN and LIBERO benchmarks, alongside real-world robot deployment, consistently demonstrate substantial improvements in success rates and generalization over strong baselines.

</details>


### [515] [FedFG: Privacy-Preserving and Robust Federated Learning via Flow-Matching Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27986)
*Ruiyang Wang,Rong Pan,Zhengan Yao*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: FedFG：基于流匹配生成的联邦学习框架，通过解耦特征提取器和分类器，结合流匹配生成器保护隐私并抵抗投毒攻击


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统联邦学习存在隐私保护不足和服务器缺乏可靠聚合规则的问题，攻击者可能窃取梯度信息或发起投毒攻击，需要在准确性和安全性之间取得平衡

Method: 1) 客户端将本地网络解耦为私有特征提取器和公共分类器；2) 使用流匹配生成器替代提取器与服务器交互，保护私有特征同时学习数据分布；3) 服务器采用客户端更新验证方案和基于合成样本的鲁棒聚合机制

Result: 在MNIST、FMNIST和CIFAR-10数据集上，相比现有方法，FedFG能适应多种攻击策略，在保持强隐私保护的同时获得更高准确率

Conclusion: FedFG框架有效平衡了联邦学习中的准确性和安全性，同时解决了隐私保护和投毒攻击防御问题

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) enables distributed clients to collaboratively train a global model using local private data. Nevertheless, recent studies show that conventional FL algorithms still exhibit deficiencies in privacy protection, and the server lacks a reliable and stable aggregation rule for updating the global model. This situation creates opportunities for adversaries: on the one hand, they may eavesdrop on uploaded gradients or model parameters, potentially leaking benign clients' private data; on the other hand, they may compromise clients to launch poisoning attacks that corrupt the global model. To balance accuracy and security, we propose FedFG, a robust FL framework based on flow-matching generation that simultaneously preserves client privacy and resists sophisticated poisoning attacks. On the client side, each local network is decoupled into a private feature extractor and a public classifier. Each client is further equipped with a flow-matching generator that replaces the extractor when interacting with the server, thereby protecting private features while learning an approximation of the underlying data distribution. Complementing the client-side design, the server employs a client-update verification scheme and a novel robust aggregation mechanism driven by synthetic samples produced by the flow-matching generator. Experiments on MNIST, FMNIST, and CIFAR-10 demonstrate that, compared with prior work, our approach adapts to multiple attack strategies and achieves higher accuracy while maintaining strong privacy protection.

</details>


### [516] [Self++: Co-Determined Agency for Human--AI Symbiosis in Extended Reality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28306)
*Thammathip Piumsomboon*

Main category: cs.HC

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: Self++ 是一个扩展现实(XR)中人类-AI共生的设计蓝图，通过三层叠加(能力、自主性、关联性)和九种角色模式，在保持人类作者身份的同时利用AI能力，基于自我决定理论和自由能原理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决XR环境中AI辅助可能导致的过度依赖、隐蔽说服和责任模糊问题，在增强人类能力的同时保持人类判断力和自主权，实现真正的共生关系。

Method: 基于自我决定理论(自主性、能力、关联性)和自由能原理，提出共同决定框架，包含三层叠加：能力支持层(Self)、自主性支持层(Self+)、关联性和目的支持层(Self++)，以及九种角色模式。

Result: 提出了一个基于角色的设计框架，用于构建和评估XR-AI系统，能够在工作、学习和社会生活中增强能力而不替代判断，促进人类弹性发展。

Conclusion: Self++为XR-AI系统设计提供了系统化框架，通过共同决定原则(透明度、适应性、可协商性)实现人类与AI的共生关系，在增强能力的同时保持人类自主权和判断力。

Abstract: Self++ is a design blueprint for human-AI symbiosis in extended reality (XR) that preserves human authorship while still benefiting from increasingly capable AI agents. Because XR can shape both perceptual evidence and action, apparently 'helpful' assistance can drift into over-reliance, covert persuasion, and blurred responsibility. Self++ grounds interaction in two complementary theories: Self-Determination Theory (autonomy, competence, relatedness) and the Free Energy Principle (predictive stability under uncertainty). It operationalises these foundations through co-determination, treating the human and the AI as a coupled system that must keep intent and limits legible, tune support over time, and preserve the user's right to endorse, contest, and override. These requirements are summarised as the co-determination principles (T.A.N.): Transparency, Adaptivity, and Negotiability. Self++ organises augmentation into three concurrently activatable overlays spanning sensorimotor competence support (Self: competence overlay), deliberative autonomy support (Self+: autonomy overlay), and social and long-horizon relatedness and purpose support (Self++: relatedness and purpose overlay). Across the overlays, it specifies nine role patterns (Tutor, Skill Builder, Coach; Choice Architect, Advisor, Agentic Worker; Contextual Interpreter, Social Facilitator, Purpose Amplifier) that can be implemented as interaction patterns, not personas. The contribution is a role-based map for designing and evaluating XR-AI systems that grow capability without replacing judgment, enabling symbiotic agency in work, learning, and social life and resilient human development.

</details>


### [517] [TokenDance: Token-to-Token Music-to-Dance Generation with Bidirectional Mamba](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27314)
*Ziyue Yang,Kaixing Yang,Xulong Tang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: TokenDance：一种两阶段的音乐到舞蹈生成框架，通过双模态标记化和高效的标记级生成，解决了现有3D舞蹈数据集覆盖范围有限的问题，实现了更好的泛化能力和表达力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D舞蹈数据集覆盖的音乐风格和编舞模式有限，导致当前模型在真实世界音乐上的泛化能力差，生成的舞蹈过于简单和重复，降低了表达力和真实感。

Method: 1. 第一阶段：使用有限标量量化对舞蹈和音乐进行离散化，将舞蹈动作分解为上、下半身组件并加入运动学-动力学约束，将音乐分解为语义和声学特征；2. 第二阶段：基于双向Mamba骨干构建局部-全局-局部标记到标记生成器，实现连贯运动合成、强音乐-舞蹈对齐和非自回归高效推理。

Result: TokenDance在生成质量和推理速度方面均达到最先进的性能，展示了其在真实世界音乐到舞蹈应用中的有效性和实用价值。

Conclusion: 该框架通过双模态标记化和高效的标记级生成，显著提升了音乐到舞蹈生成的表达力、真实感和泛化能力，为虚拟现实、舞蹈教育等应用提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Music-to-dance generation has broad applications in virtual reality, dance education, and digital character animation. However, the limited coverage of existing 3D dance datasets confines current models to a narrow subset of music styles and choreographic patterns, resulting in poor generalization to real-world music. Consequently, generated dances often become overly simplistic and repetitive, substantially degrading expressiveness and realism.
  To tackle this problem, we present TokenDance, a two-stage music-to-dance generation framework that explicitly addresses this limitation through dual-modality tokenization and efficient token-level generation. In the first stage, we discretize both dance and music using Finite Scalar Quantization, where dance motions are factorized into upper and lower-body components with kinematic-dynamic constraints, and music is decomposed into semantic and acoustic features with dedicated codebooks to capture choreography-specific structures. In the second stage, we introduce a Local-Global-Local token-to-token generator built on a Bidirectional Mamba backbone, enabling coherent motion synthesis, strong music-dance alignment, and efficient non-autoregressive inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TokenDance achieves overall state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in both generation quality and inference speed, highlighting its effectiveness and practical value for real-world music-to-dance applications.

</details>


### [518] [HeteroHub: An Applicable Data Management Framework for Heterogeneous Multi-Embodied Agent System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28010)
*Xujia Li,Xin Li,Junquan Huang,Beirong Cui,Zibin Wu,Lei Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: HeteroHub是一个面向异构多具身智能体系统的数据管理框架，整合静态知识、多模态训练数据和实时传感器流，支持任务感知模型训练、上下文敏感执行和闭环控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 异构多具身智能体系统需要协调具有不同能力的多个智能体在动态环境中完成任务，这涉及收集、生成和消费海量异构数据。现有框架缺乏统一的数据管理基础设施来支持此类系统的实际部署。

Method: 提出HeteroHub数据中心框架，整合三类数据：1) 关于智能体、任务和环境的静态知识；2) 针对不同AI模型的多模态训练数据集；3) 高频传感器流。框架支持任务感知模型训练、上下文敏感执行和基于现实世界反馈的闭环控制。

Result: 在演示中，HeteroHub成功协调多个具身AI智能体执行复杂任务，展示了强大的数据管理框架如何实现可扩展、可维护和可演进的具身AI系统。

Conclusion: HeteroHub为异构多具身智能体系统提供了一个统一的数据管理基础设施，解决了现有框架在数据管理方面的不足，支持实际部署和系统演进。

Abstract: Heterogeneous Multi-Embodied Agent Systems involve coordinating multiple embodied agents with diverse capabilities to accomplish tasks in dynamic environments. This process requires the collection, generation, and consumption of massive, heterogeneous data, which primarily falls into three categories: static knowledge regarding the agents, tasks, and environments; multimodal training datasets tailored for various AI models; and high-frequency sensor streams. However, existing frameworks lack a unified data management infrastructure to support the real-world deployment of such systems. To address this gap, we present \textbf{HeteroHub}, a data-centric framework that integrates static metadata, task-aligned training corpora, and real-time data streams.
