The framework supports task-aware model training, context-sensitive execution, and closed-loop control driven by real-world feedback. In our demonstration, HeteroHub successfully coordinates multiple embodied AI agents to execute complex tasks, illustrating how a robust data management framework can enable scalable, maintainable, and evolvable embodied AI systems.

</details>


### [519] [Grounding Social Perception in Intuitive Physics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27410)
*Lance Ying,Aydan Y. Huang,Aviv Netanyahu,Andrei Barbu,Boris Katz,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Tianmin Shu*

Main category: q-bio.NC

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 论文提出PHASE数据集和SIMPLE模型，研究人类如何通过整合直觉心理学和直觉物理学来理解物理环境中的社会互动，发现基于物理的贝叶斯逆规划模型能更好匹配人类判断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究人类如何从物理约束的社会互动中推断丰富的社会信息，挑战传统的视觉模式匹配观点，提出需要整合直觉心理学和直觉物理学的推理过程。

Method: 1) 创建PHASE数据集：程序生成的2D物理模拟动画，包含系统变化的环境几何、物体动态、智能体能力、目标和关系；2) 提出SIMPLE模型：基于物理的贝叶斯逆规划模型，整合规划、概率规划和物理模拟来推断智能体目标和关系。

Result: SIMPLE模型在多样场景中达到高准确率并与人类判断高度一致，而前馈基线模型（包括强视觉语言模型）和物理无关的逆规划模型未能达到人类水平性能，也不与人类判断对齐。

Conclusion: 人类理解物理基础社会场景是通过反转一个整合物理和智能体的生成模型实现的，这为计算建模提供了新方向。

Abstract: People infer rich social information from others' actions. These inferences are often constrained by the physical world: what agents can do, what obstacles permit, and how the physical actions of agents causally change an environment and other agents' mental states and behavior. We propose that such rich social perception is more than visual pattern matching, but rather a reasoning process grounded in an integration of intuitive psychology with intuitive physics. To test this hypothesis, we introduced PHASE (PHysically grounded Abstract Social Events), a large dataset of procedurally generated animations, depicting physically simulated two-agent interactions on a 2D surface. Each animation follows the style of the Heider and Simmel movie, with systematic variation in environment geometry, object dynamics, agent capacities, goals, and relationships (friendly/adversarial/neutral). We then present a computational model, SIMPLE, a physics-grounded Bayesian inverse planning model that integrates planning, probabilistic planning, and physics simulation to infer agents' goals and relations from their trajectories. Our experimental results showed that SIMPLE achieved high accuracy and agreement with human judgments across diverse scenarios, while feedforward baseline models -- including strong vision-language models -- and physics-agnostic inverse planning failed to achieve human-level performance and did not align with human judgments. These results suggest that our model provides a computational account for how people understand physically grounded social scenes by inverting a generative model of physics and agents.

</details>


### [520] [Drag or Traction: Understanding How Designers Appropriate Friction in AI Ideation Outputs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27550)
*A. Baki Kocaballi,Joseph Kizana,Sharon Stein,Simon Buckingham Shum*

Main category: cs.HC

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 提出生成性摩擦概念，通过故意破坏AI输出（碎片化、延迟、模糊性）来对抗设计固化，将AI输出从成品转变为半成品材料，鼓励人类贡献而非被动接受。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI系统通常呈现为完整、精美的输出，导致用户固着于AI建议而非产生自己的想法，这种现象被称为"设计固化"。需要一种方法来促进人类创造力而非被动消费。

Method: 提出生成性摩擦概念，包括三种故意破坏AI输出的方式：碎片化（破碎文本）、延迟（时间间隔）、模糊性（隐喻）。通过定性研究（6名设计师）探索用户如何利用这些摩擦。

Result: 用户以不同方式利用摩擦：从破碎文本中挖掘关键词，利用延迟作为独立思考的工作空间，将隐喻作为创意谜题解决。但效果并非普遍，引出"摩擦倾向"概念。

Conclusion: 生成性摩擦不同于保护性摩擦，能对抗设计固化同时保持人类能动性。摩擦倾向（对模糊性的容忍度和现有工作流程导向）是重要调节因素，高倾向用户视摩擦为"解放"，低倾向用户则感到拖累。

Abstract: Seamless AI presents output as a finished, polished product that users consume rather than shape. This risks design fixation: users anchor on AI suggestions rather than generating their own ideas. We propose Generative Friction, which introduces intentional disruptions to AI output (fragmentation, delay, ambiguity) designed to transform it from finished product into semi-finished material, inviting human contribution rather than passive acceptance. In a qualitative study with six designers, we identified the different ways in which designers appropriated the different types of friction: users mined keywords from broken text, used delays as workspace for independent thought, and solved metaphors as creative puzzles. However, this transformation was not universal, motivating the concept of Friction Disposition, a user's propensity to interpret resistance as invitation rather than obstruction. Grounded in tolerance for ambiguity and pre-existing workflow orientation, Friction Disposition emerged as a potential moderator: high-disposition users treated friction as "liberating," while low-disposition users experienced drag. We contribute the concept of Generative Friction as distinct from Protective Friction, with design implications for AI tools that counter fixation while preserving agency.

</details>


### [521] [PeopleSearchBench: A Multi-Dimensional Benchmark for Evaluating AI-Powered People Search Platforms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27476)
*Wei Wang,Tianyu Shi,Shuai Zhang,Boyang Xia,Zequn Xie,Chenyu Zeng,Qi Zhang,Lynn Ai,Yaqi Yu,Kaiming Zhang,Feiyue Tang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: PeopleSearchBench：首个用于评估AI人员搜索平台的基准，包含119个真实查询和基于事实验证的评估方法，发现Lessie系统表现最佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI人员搜索平台在招聘、销售等场景广泛应用，但缺乏广泛接受的性能评估基准，需要客观的评估方法来比较不同系统。

Method: 提出PeopleSearchBench基准，包含119个真实查询覆盖4个用例；开发Criteria-Grounded Verification方法，从查询中提取可验证标准，通过实时网络搜索验证结果相关性。

Result: Lessie系统表现最佳，总分65.2，比第二名高18.5%，是唯一在所有119个查询中实现100%任务完成率的系统；评估方法具有高可靠性（Cohen's kappa = 0.84）。

Conclusion: PeopleSearchBench为AI人员搜索平台提供了首个全面、客观的评估基准，Criteria-Grounded Verification方法比主观LLM评估更可靠，有助于推动该领域发展。

Abstract: AI-powered people search platforms are increasingly used in recruiting, sales prospecting, and professional networking, yet no widely accepted benchmark exists for evaluating their performance. We introduce PeopleSearchBench, an open-source benchmark that compares four people search platforms on 119 real-world queries across four use cases: corporate recruiting, B2B sales prospecting, expert search with deterministic answers, and influencer/KOL discovery. A key contribution is Criteria-Grounded Verification, a factual relevance pipeline that extracts explicit, verifiable criteria from each query and uses live web search to determine whether returned people satisfy them. This produces binary relevance judgments grounded in factual verification rather than subjective holistic LLM-as-judge scores. We evaluate systems on three dimensions: Relevance Precision (padded nDCG@10), Effective Coverage (task completion and qualified result yield), and Information Utility (profile completeness and usefulness), averaged equally into an overall score. Lessie, a specialized AI people search agent, performs best overall, scoring 65.2, 18.5% higher than the second-ranked system, and is the only system to achieve 100% task completion across all 119 queries. We also report confidence intervals, human validation of the verification pipeline (Cohen's kappa = 0.84), ablations, and full documentation of queries, prompts, and normalization procedures. Code, query definitions, and aggregated results are available on GitHub.

</details>


### [522] [DSevolve: Enabling Real-Time Adaptive Scheduling on Dynamic Shop Floor with LLM-Evolved Heuristic Portfolios](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27628)
*Jin Huang,Jie Yang,XinLei Zhou,Qihao Liu,Liang Gao,Xinyu Li*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: DSevolve：一种工业调度框架，通过演化行为多样的调度规则组合，并基于车间状态动态选择最佳规则，以应对动态制造环境中的中断事件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在动态制造环境中，机器故障和新订单到达等中断会持续改变最优调度策略，需要自适应规则选择。现有的LLM驱动的自动启发式设计框架通常演化单一精英规则，无法满足这种适应性需求。

Method: 1. 离线阶段：使用多角色种子和拓扑感知进化算子演化行为多样的规则组合，存储在MAP-Elites特征空间索引的档案中
2. 在线阶段：通过探针式指纹机制表征当前车间状态，从离线知识库检索高质量候选规则，通过快速前瞻模拟选择最佳规则

Result: 在基于真实工业数据生成的500个动态柔性作业车间实例上评估，DSevolve优于最先进的AHD框架、经典调度规则、遗传规划和深度强化学习方法。

Conclusion: DSevolve为智能车间调度提供了一个实用且可部署的解决方案，能够以秒级响应时间适应动态制造环境中的中断。

Abstract: In dynamic manufacturing environments, disruptions such as machine breakdowns and new order arrivals continuously shift the optimal dispatching strategy, making adaptive rule selection essential. Existing LLM-powered Automatic Heuristic Design (AHD) frameworks evolve toward a single elite rule that cannot meet this adaptability demand. To address this, we present DSevolve, an industrial scheduling framework that evolves a quality-diverse portfolio of dispatching rules offline and adaptively deploys them online with second-level response time. Multi-persona seeding and topology-aware evolutionary operators produce a behaviorally diverse rule archive indexed by a MAP-Elites feature space. Upon each disruption event, a probe-based fingerprinting mechanism characterizes the current shop floor state, retrieves high-quality candidate rules from an offline knowledge base, and selects the best one via rapid look-ahead simulation. Evaluated on 500 dynamic flexible job shop instances derived from real industrial data, DSevolve outperforms state-of-the-art AHD frameworks, classical dispatching rules, genetic programming, and deep reinforcement learning, offering a practical and deployable solution for intelligent shop floor scheduling.

</details>


### [523] [A Multi-Agent Rhizomatic Pipeline for Non-Linear Literature Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28336)
*Julio C. Serrano. Joonas Kevari,Rumy Narayan*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出Rhizomatic Research Agent (V3)，一个基于德勒兹过程关系本体论的多智能体计算管道，用于进行非线性文献分析，通过12个专门智能体在七阶段架构中操作，旨在克服传统系统文献综述的树状逻辑限制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 社会科学中的系统文献综述通常遵循树状逻辑（层次化关键词过滤、线性筛选、分类学分类），这种逻辑抑制了复杂研究领域中特有的横向连接、断裂和涌现模式。研究旨在开发一种能够进行非线性文献分析的方法。

Method: 开发了一个多智能体计算管道，包含12个专门智能体，在七阶段架构中操作。系统将根茎的六个原则（连接、异质性、多重性、非意指断裂、制图学、转印）操作化为自动化管道，整合了LLM编排、OpenAlex和arXiv的双源语料库摄取、SciBERT语义地形和动态断裂检测协议。

Result: 初步部署表明，该系统能够揭示跨学科趋同和结构性研究空白，这些是传统综述方法系统性地忽视的。管道是开源的，可扩展到任何需要非线性知识映射的现象领域。

Conclusion: Rhizomatic Research Agent为文献分析提供了一种创新的非线性方法，克服了传统树状逻辑的限制，能够更好地捕捉复杂研究领域的动态和连接。

Abstract: Systematic literature reviews in the social sciences overwhelmingly follow arborescent logics -- hierarchical keyword filtering, linear screening, and taxonomic classification -- that suppress the lateral connections, ruptures, and emergent patterns characteristic of complex research landscapes. This research note presents the Rhizomatic Research Agent (V3), a multi-agent computational pipeline grounded in Deleuzian process-relational ontology, designed to conduct non-linear literature analysis through 12 specialized agents operating across a seven-phase architecture. The system was developed in response to the methodological groundwork established by (Narayan2023), who employed rhizomatic inquiry in her doctoral research on sustainable energy transitions but relied on manual, researcher-driven exploration. The Rhizomatic Research Agent operationalizes the six principles of the rhizome -- connection, heterogeneity, multiplicity, asignifying rupture, cartography, and decalcomania -- into an automated pipeline integrating large language model (LLM) orchestration, dual-source corpus ingestion from OpenAlex and arXiv, SciBERT semantic topography, and dynamic rupture detection protocols. Preliminary deployment demonstrates the system's capacity to surface cross-disciplinary convergences and structural research gaps that conventional review methods systematically overlook. The pipeline is open-source and extensible to any phenomenon zone where non-linear knowledge mapping is required.

</details>


### [524] [T-Norm Operators for EU AI Act Compliance Classification: An Empirical Comparison of Lukasiewicz, Product, and Gödel Semantics in a Neuro-Symbolic Reasoning System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28558)
*Adam Laabs*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 比较三种t-norm算子（Lukasiewicz、Product、Gödel）在神经符号推理系统中用于欧盟AI法案合规分类的性能，发现Gödel算子准确率最高但产生少量误报，而Lukasiewicz和Product算子保持零误报但召回率较低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究不同逻辑连接机制（t-norm算子）在神经符号推理系统中的应用效果，特别是在欧盟AI法案合规分类这一实际应用场景中，探索哪种算子能在准确率、误报率和召回率之间达到最佳平衡。

Method: 使用LGGT+（逻辑引导图变换器增强版）引擎，在包含1035个标注的AI系统描述（涵盖禁止、高风险、有限风险、最小风险四类）的基准数据集上，比较Lukasiewicz、Product和Gödel三种t-norm算子的分类性能，评估指标包括准确率、误报率、漏报率以及对模糊案例的处理能力。

Result: 三种算子在1035个样本上表现显著不同（McNemar检验p<0.001）。Gödel算子准确率最高（84.5%），边界案例召回率最佳（85%），但产生8个误报（0.8%）。Lukasiewicz和Product算子保持零误报，其中Product算子准确率81.2%优于Lukasiewicz的78.5%。

Conclusion: 算子选择的重要性次于规则库的完整性；Lukasiewicz和Product算子能保持零误报但会漏掉边界案例；Gödel算子的最小语义能获得更高召回率但需承担少量误报代价；混合语义分类器是下一步有前景的研究方向。

Abstract: We present a first comparative pilot study of three t-norm operators -- Lukasiewicz (T_L), Product (T_P), and Gödel (T_G) - as logical conjunction mechanisms in a neuro-symbolic reasoning system for EU AI Act compliance classification. Using the LGGT+ (Logic-Guided Graph Transformers Plus) engine and a benchmark of 1035 annotated AI system descriptions spanning four risk categories (prohibited, high_risk, limited_risk, minimal_risk), we evaluate classification accuracy, false positive and false negative rates, and operator behaviour on ambiguous cases. At n=1035, all three operators differ significantly (McNemar p<0.001). T_G achieves highest accuracy (84.5%) and best borderline recall (85%), but introduces 8 false positives (0.8%) via min-semantics over-classification. T_L and T_P maintain zero false positives, with T_P outperforming T_L (81.2% vs. 78.5%). Our principal findings are: (1) operator choice is secondary to rule base completeness; (2) T_L and T_P maintain zero false positives but miss borderline cases; (3) T_G's min-semantics achieves higher recall at cost of 0.8% false positive rate; (4) a mixed-semantics classifier is the productive next step. We release the LGGT+ core engine (201/201 tests passing) and benchmark dataset (n=1035) under Apache 2.0.

</details>


### [525] [Lingshu-Cell: A generative cellular world model for transcriptome modeling toward virtual cells](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.25240)
*Han Zhang,Guo-Hua Yuan,Chaohao Yuan,Tingyang Xu,Tian Bian,Hong Cheng,Wenbing Huang,Deli Zhao,Yu Rong*

Main category: q-bio.QM

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: Lingshu-Cell是一个基于掩码离散扩散模型的单细胞转录组学基础模型，能够学习细胞状态分布并进行条件模拟，支持扰动响应预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单细胞转录组学基础模型主要提供静态表示，但无法显式建模细胞状态分布以进行生成式模拟。需要一种能够捕获复杂转录组表达依赖关系并支持扰动条件模拟的模型。

Method: 提出Lingshu-Cell，一个掩码离散扩散模型，直接在离散标记空间操作，兼容单细胞转录组数据的稀疏非序列特性。模型能够处理约18,000个基因，无需依赖先验基因选择，并联合嵌入细胞类型/供体身份与扰动信息。

Result: 模型在多种组织和物种中准确再现转录组分布、标记基因表达模式和细胞亚型比例。在Virtual Cell Challenge H1遗传扰动基准和人类PBMCs细胞因子诱导响应预测中取得领先性能。

Conclusion: Lingshu-Cell建立了一个灵活的细胞世界模型，用于细胞状态和扰动响应的计算机模拟，为生物发现和扰动筛选提供了新范式。

Abstract: Modeling cellular states and predicting their responses to perturbations are central challenges in computational biology and the development of virtual cells. Existing foundation models for single-cell transcriptomics provide powerful static representations, but they do not explicitly model the distribution of cellular states for generative simulation. Here, we introduce Lingshu-Cell, a masked discrete diffusion model that learns transcriptomic state distributions and supports conditional simulation under perturbation. By operating directly in a discrete token space that is compatible with the sparse, non-sequential nature of single-cell transcriptomic data, Lingshu-Cell captures complex transcriptome-wide expression dependencies across approximately 18,000 genes without relying on prior gene selection, such as filtering by high variability or ranking by expression level. Across diverse tissues and species, Lingshu-Cell accurately reproduces transcriptomic distributions, marker-gene expression patterns and cell-subtype proportions, demonstrating its ability to capture complex cellular heterogeneity. Moreover, by jointly embedding cell type or donor identity with perturbation, Lingshu-Cell can predict whole-transcriptome expression changes for novel combinations of identity and perturbation. It achieves leading performance on the Virtual Cell Challenge H1 genetic perturbation benchmark and in predicting cytokine-induced responses in human PBMCs. Together, these results establish Lingshu-Cell as a flexible cellular world model for in silico simulation of cell states and perturbation responses, laying the foundation for a new paradigm in biological discovery and perturbation screening.

</details>


### [526] [Power Couple? AI Growth and Renewable Energy Investment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26678)
*Luyi Gui,Tinglong Dai*

Main category: cs.CY

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文通过博弈论模型分析AI发展与可再生能源投资之间的均衡关系，揭示了两种不同机制：当AI能力回报超模且性能随算力线性增长时，会陷入"适应陷阱"；当AI面临收益递减时，则会形成"适应路径"实现碳中和。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI与可再生能源常被视为"强力组合"，但存在AI可能加剧化石燃料碳锁定的担忧。论文旨在通过建模分析AI增长与可再生能源投资之间的均衡互动，解释这两种对立观点。

Method: 采用简约博弈论模型：政策制定者投资可再生能源容量供AI使用，AI开发者选择能力水平。分析不同扩展机制（超模回报vs收益递减）和市场激励下的均衡结果，并进行校准案例研究。

Result: 发现两种均衡机制：1）"适应陷阱"：AI能力回报超模且性能线性增长时，开发者追求前沿规模，可再生能源扩张主要缓解扩展约束而非替代化石燃料；2）"适应路径"：AI收益递减时，能源成本约束能力选择，可再生能源投资既支持能力又实现脱碳。

Conclusion: AI脱碳是均衡结果，有效政策必须确保清洁能源容量在算力扩展时始终约束边际使用。气候压力可能强化前沿扩展激励或清洁能源扩张激励，取决于AI的扩展机制。

Abstract: AI and renewable energy are increasingly framed as a "power couple" -- the idea that surging AI electricity demand will accelerate clean-energy investment -- yet concerns persist that AI will instead entrench fossil-fuel carbon lock-in. We reconcile these views by modeling the equilibrium interaction between AI growth and renewable investment. In a parsimonious game, a policymaker invests in renewable capacity available to AI and an AI developer chooses capability; the equilibrium depends on scaling regimes and market incentives. When the market payoff to capability is supermodular and performance gains are near-linear in compute, developers push toward frontier scale even when the marginal megawatt-hour is fossil-based. In this regime, renewable expansion can primarily relax scaling constraints rather than displace fossil generation one-for-one, weakening incentives to build enough clean capacity and reinforcing fossil dependence. This yields an "adaptation trap": as climate damages rise, the value of AI-enabled adaptation increases, which strengthens incentives to enable frontier scaling while tolerating residual fossil use. When AI faces diminishing returns and lower scaling efficiency, energy costs discipline capability choices; renewable investment then both enables capability and decarbonizes marginal compute, generating an "adaptation pathway" in which climate stress strengthens incentives for clean-capacity expansion and can support a carbon-free equilibrium. A calibrated case study illustrates these mechanisms using observed magnitudes for investment, capability, and energy use. Decarbonizing AI is an equilibrium outcome: effective policy must keep clean capacity binding at the margin as compute expands.

</details>


### [527] [Contextual Graph Representations for Task-Driven 3D Perception and Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26685)
*Christopher Agia*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究机器人任务规划与3D场景图的交叉领域，测试现有具身AI环境适用性，构建基准比较经典规划器，并探索图神经网络利用关系结构不变性来学习加速规划的表示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D场景图虽然能自动提取物体中心关系表示，但包含过多对象和关系，而具体任务通常只需要其中一小部分。这放大了任务规划器的状态空间，阻碍在资源受限环境中的部署。

Method: 1) 测试现有具身AI环境在机器人任务规划与3D场景图交叉研究的适用性；2) 构建基准进行最先进经典规划器的实证比较；3) 探索使用图神经网络利用规划领域关系结构的不变性，学习能够加速规划的表示。

Result: 论文建立了机器人任务规划与3D场景图研究的基准环境，比较了不同经典规划器的性能，并展示了图神经网络如何通过学习关系结构表示来提升规划效率。

Conclusion: 该研究为3D场景图在机器人任务规划中的应用提供了实证基础，展示了图神经网络在加速规划方面的潜力，为资源受限环境中的高效规划提供了新方向。

Abstract: Recent advances in computer vision facilitate fully automatic extraction of object-centric relational representations from visual-inertial data. These state representations, dubbed 3D scene graphs, are a hierarchical decomposition of real-world scenes with a dense multiplex graph structure. While 3D scene graphs claim to promote efficient task planning for robot systems, they contain numerous objects and relations when only small subsets are required for a given task. This magnifies the state space that task planners must operate over and prohibits deployment in resource constrained settings. This thesis tests the suitability of existing embodied AI environments for research at the intersection of robot task planning and 3D scene graphs and constructs a benchmark for empirical comparison of state-of-the-art classical planners. Furthermore, we explore the use of graph neural networks to harness invariances in the relational structure of planning domains and learn representations that afford faster planning.

</details>


### [528] [Learning Energy-Efficient Air--Ground Actuation for Hybrid Robots on Stair-Like Terrain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26687)
*Jiaxing Li,Wen Tian,Xinhang Xu,Junbin Yuan,Sebastian Scherer,Muqing Cao*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种能量感知强化学习框架，训练单一连续策略协调无人机螺旋桨、轮子和倾斜舵机，实现混合空中-地面机器人的高效运动，无需预定义空中和地面模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合空中-地面机器人虽然兼具通过性和续航能力，但在楼梯状不连续地形上面临权衡：仅使用轮子容易在边缘卡住，而飞行模式对小高度增益能耗过高。需要一种能智能协调不同执行器的方法来优化能量效率。

Method: 采用能量感知强化学习框架，训练单一连续策略协调螺旋桨、轮子和倾斜舵机。在Isaac Lab中使用并行环境进行训练，基于硬件校准的推力/功率模型，使奖励函数惩罚真实电能消耗。策略仅使用本体感知和局部高度扫描作为输入。

Result: 学习到的策略发现了推力辅助驱动，混合了空中推力和地面牵引力。在模拟中，相比仅使用螺旋桨的控制，能耗降低约4倍。将策略转移到DoubleBee原型机上，在8cm间隙攀爬任务中，相比基于规则的解耦控制器，平均功率降低38%。

Conclusion: 高效混合驱动可以通过学习自然涌现，并能在硬件上部署。这表明强化学习可以训练出协调多种执行器的智能策略，实现能量优化的混合机器人运动。

Abstract: Hybrid aerial--ground robots offer both traversability and endurance, but stair-like discontinuities create a trade-off: wheels alone often stall at edges, while flight is energy-hungry for small height gains. We propose an energy-aware reinforcement learning framework that trains a single continuous policy to coordinate propellers, wheels, and tilt servos without predefined aerial and ground modes. We train policies from proprioception and a local height scan in Isaac Lab with parallel environments, using hardware-calibrated thrust/power models so the reward penalizes true electrical energy. The learned policy discovers thrust-assisted driving that blends aerial thrust and ground traction. In simulation it achieves about 4 times lower energy than propeller-only control. We transfer the policy to a DoubleBee prototype on an 8cm gap-climbing task; it achieves 38% lower average power than a rule-based decoupled controller. These results show that efficient hybrid actuation can emerge from learning and deploy on hardware.

</details>


### [529] [SpatialPoint: Spatial-aware Point Prediction for Embodied Localization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26690)
*Qiming Zhu,Zhirui Fang,Tianming Zhang,Chuanxiu Liu,Xiaoke Jiang,Lei Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出SpatialPoint框架，将深度信息集成到视觉语言模型中，用于解决具身定位问题——预测可执行的3D点坐标，支持触摸点和空中点两种类型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 具身智能需要确定在3D空间中的行动位置，现有视觉语言系统主要依赖RGB输入，缺乏显式的几何重建能力，限制了跨场景泛化。尽管RGB-D传感器在机器人中广泛使用，但深度信息在VLM中尚未得到充分利用。

Method: 提出SpatialPoint框架，将结构化深度信息集成到视觉语言模型中，生成相机坐标系下的3D坐标。构建了包含260万样本的RGB-D数据集，涵盖触摸点和空中点的问答对。设计了两种目标类型：触摸点（表面3D点）和空中点（自由空间3D点）。

Result: 实验表明，将深度信息集成到VLM中显著提高了具身定位性能。在真实机器人部署中验证了三个代表性任务：语言引导的机械臂指定位置抓取、目标位置物体放置、移动机器人目标位置导航。

Conclusion: SpatialPoint框架通过集成深度信息有效解决了具身定位问题，提升了3D空间推理能力，在真实机器人任务中表现出色，为具身智能提供了重要的空间感知能力。

Abstract: Embodied intelligence fundamentally requires a capability to determine where to act in 3D space. We formalize this requirement as embodied localization -- the problem of predicting executable 3D points conditioned on visual observations and language instructions. We instantiate embodied localization with two complementary target types: touchable points, surface-grounded 3D points enabling direct physical interaction, and air points, free-space 3D points specifying placement and navigation goals, directional constraints, or geometric relations. Embodied localization is inherently a problem of embodied 3D spatial reasoning -- yet most existing vision-language systems rely predominantly on RGB inputs, necessitating implicit geometric reconstruction that limits cross-scene generalization, despite the widespread adoption of RGB-D sensors in robotics. To address this gap, we propose SpatialPoint, a spatial-aware vision-language framework with careful design that integrates structured depth into a vision-language model (VLM) and generates camera-frame 3D coordinates. We construct a 2.6M-sample RGB-D dataset covering both touchable and air points QA pairs for training and evaluation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that incorporating depth into VLMs significantly improves embodied localization performance. We further validate SpatialPoint through real-robot deployment across three representative tasks: language-guided robotic arm grasping at specified locations, object placement to target destinations, and mobile robot navigation to goal positions.

</details>


### [530] [Physicochemical-Neural Fusion for Semi-Closed-Circuit Respiratory Autonomy in Extreme Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26697)
*Phillip Kingston,Nicholas Johnston*

Main category: eess.SY

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 论文介绍了一个用于消防服的生命支持系统，采用半闭路呼吸装置，结合物理化学模型和AI控制架构（MPC+RL+安全过滤器），在模拟中比PID基线提升18-34%的续航时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为消防员开发智能生命支持系统，解决未知任务时长和体力消耗下的呼吸气体管理问题，通过AI控制优化氧气使用效率同时确保生理和火灾安全。

Method: 1) 物理化学基础：状态一致热化学、化学计量容量限制、吸附等温线、氧气管理约束
2) AI控制架构：三层传感器融合（环境、服装内部、生物特征）、18状态3控制非线性状态空间模型
3) 控制算法：滚动时域模型预测控制（MPC）+强化学习策略建议器+控制屏障函数安全过滤器

Result: 在模拟中相比PID基线实现18-34%的续航时间提升，同时保持更严格的生理和火灾安全边界。

Conclusion: 提出的AI控制架构能有效管理有限呼吸资源，在未知任务条件下优化性能并确保安全，为消防员生命支持系统提供了创新解决方案。

Abstract: This paper introduces Galactic Bioware's Life Support System, a semi-closed-circuit breathing apparatus designed for integration into a positive-pressure firefighting suit and governed by an AI control system. The breathing loop incorporates a soda lime CO2 scrubber, a silica gel dehumidifier, and pure O2 replenishment with finite consumables. One-way exhaust valves maintain positive pressure while creating a semi-closed system in which outward venting gradually depletes the gas inventory. Part I develops the physicochemical foundations from first principles, including state-consistent thermochemistry, stoichiometric capacity limits, adsorption isotherms, and oxygen-management constraints arising from both fire safety and toxicity. Part II introduces an AI control architecture that fuses three sensor tiers, external environmental sensing, internal suit atmosphere sensing (with triple-redundant O2 cells and median voting), and firefighter biometrics. The controller combines receding-horizon model-predictive control (MPC) with a learned metabolic model and a reinforcement learning (RL) policy advisor, with all candidate actuator commands passing through a final control-barrier-function safety filter before reaching the hardware. This architecture is intended to optimize performance under unknown mission duration and exertion profiles. In this paper we introduce an 18-state, 3-control nonlinear state-space formulation using only sensors viable in structural firefighting, with triple-redundant O2 sensing and median voting. Finally, we introduce an MPC framework with a dynamic resource scarcity multiplier, an RL policy advisor for warm-starting, and a final control-barrier-function safety filter through which all actuator commands must pass, demonstrating 18-34% endurance improvement in simulation over PID baselines while maintaining tighter physiological and fire-safety margins.

</details>


### [531] [Stress Classification from ECG Signals Using Vision Transformer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26721)
*Zeeshan Ahmad,Naimul Khan*

Main category: eess.SP

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出使用Vision Transformer进行多级压力评估，通过将ECG信号转换为2D频谱图，利用Transformer的注意力机制处理被试间变异性问题，在多个数据集上取得了优于CNN模型和现有方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然Vision Transformers在计算机视觉领域取得了巨大成功，但尚未被用于基于生理信号（如心电图ECG）的压力评估。本研究旨在利用Vision Transformer进行多级压力评估，并解决被试间变异性这一关键挑战。

Method: 将原始ECG数据通过短时傅里叶变换（STFT）转换为2D频谱图，然后将频谱图分割成patch输入到Transformer编码器。同时与1D CNN和ResNet-18进行对比实验，采用留一被试交叉验证（LOSOCV）在WESAD和RML数据集上进行评估。

Result: Vision Transformer在处理被试间变异性方面显著优于CNN模型，在RML数据集上达到71.01%的三分类准确率，在WESAD数据集上达到76.7%的三分类准确率和88.3%的二分类准确率，超越了所有现有方法。

Conclusion: Vision Transformer通过其注意力机制能够有效处理被试间变异性问题，为基于ECG信号的压力评估提供了一种端到端的解决方案，无需手工特征提取，能够学习到鲁棒的表征。

Abstract: Vision Transformers have shown tremendous success in numerous computer vision applications; however, they have not been exploited for stress assessment using physiological signals such as Electrocardiogram (ECG). In order to get the maximum benefit from the vision transformer for multilevel stress assessment, in this paper, we transform the raw ECG data into 2D spectrograms using short time Fourier transform (STFT). These spectrograms are divided into patches for feeding to the transformer encoder. We also perform experiments with 1D CNN and ResNet-18 (CNN model). We perform leave-onesubject-out cross validation (LOSOCV) experiments on WESAD and Ryerson Multimedia Lab (RML) dataset. One of the biggest challenges of LOSOCV based experiments is to tackle the problem of intersubject variability. In this research, we address the issue of intersubject variability and show our success using 2D spectrograms and the attention mechanism of transformer. Experiments show that vision transformer handles the effect of intersubject variability much better than CNN-based models and beats all previous state-of-the-art methods by a considerable margin. Moreover, our method is end-to-end, does not require handcrafted features, and can learn robust representations. The proposed method achieved 71.01% and 76.7% accuracies with RML dataset and WESAD dataset respectively for three class classification and 88.3% for binary classification on WESAD.

</details>


### [532] [Capability Safety as Datalog: A Foundational Equivalence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26725)
*Cosimo Spera*

Main category: cs.LO

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 论文证明能力安全可精确表示为命题Datalog评估，解决了Spera能力超图框架的两个结构限制：缺乏高效增量维护和审计表面包含决策程序


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Spera [2026]提出的能力超图框架存在两个关键结构限制：1) 缺乏高效增量维护机制，2) 缺乏审计表面包含的决策程序。这些限制阻碍了能力安全分析的实际应用和可扩展性。

Method: 通过证明能力安全可精确表示为命题Datalog评估（Datalogprop：一阶逻辑的单子、基础、无函数片段），将能力超图框架映射到这个逻辑片段，从而利用Datalog的算法和结构结果。

Result: 建立了能力超图与命题Datalog之间的严格等价关系，使得能力安全分析可以受益于Datalog的高效增量维护算法和决策程序，解决了原框架的两个关键限制。

Conclusion: 能力安全的形式化分析可以通过命题Datalog精确表示，这为能力安全分析提供了更强大的算法工具和理论基础，提高了分析的可扩展性和实用性。

Abstract: We prove that capability safety admits an exact representation as propositional Datalog evaluation (Datalogprop: the monadic, ground, function-free fragment of first-order logic), enabling the transfer of algorithmic and structural results unavailable in the native formulation. This addresses two structural limitations of the capability hypergraph framework of Spera [2026]: the absence of efficient incremental maintenance, and the absence of a decision procedure for audit surface containment. The equivalence is tight: capability hypergraphs correspond to exactly this fragment, no more.

</details>


### [533] [Training-Free Diffusion-Driven Modeling of Pareto Set Evolution for Dynamic Multiobjective Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26749)
*Jian Guan,Huolong Wu,Zhenzhong Wang,Gary G. Yen,Min Jiang*

Main category: cs.NE

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出DD-DMOEA，一种基于扩散的无训练动态响应机制，用于解决动态多目标优化问题，通过多步去噪过程引导种群演化，无需神经网络训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态多目标优化问题中，时变目标导致帕累托最优解集随时间漂移，现有预测方法要么依赖训练成本高的学习模型，要么使用单步种群映射，忽略了POS演化的渐进性。

Method: 将前一个环境的POS视为"噪声"样本集，通过解析构造的多步去噪过程引导其向当前POS演化。使用基于膝点的辅助策略指定新环境的目标区域，推导显式概率密度公式计算去噪更新。采用不确定性感知方案根据历史预测偏差自适应调整引导强度。

Result: 在CEC2018动态多目标基准测试中，DD-DMOEA实现了竞争性或更好的收敛-多样性性能，并提供比多个最先进DMOEA更快的动态响应。

Conclusion: DD-DMOEA是一种有效的无训练动态响应机制，通过扩散过程处理动态多目标优化，避免了神经网络训练成本，同时保持了良好的收敛性和多样性。

Abstract: Dynamic multiobjective optimization problems (DMOPs) feature time-varying objectives, which cause the Pareto optimal solution (POS) set to drift over time and make it difficult to maintain both convergence and diversity under limited response time. Many existing prediction-based dynamic multiobjective evolutionary algorithms (DMOEAs) either depend on learned models with nontrivial training cost or employ one-step population mapping, which may overlook the gradual nature of POS evolution. This paper proposes DD-DMOEA, a training-free diffusion-based dynamic response mechanism for DMOPs. The key idea is to treat the POS obtained in the previous environment as a "noisy" sample set and to guide its evolution toward the current POS through an analytically constructed multi-step denoising process. A knee-point-based auxiliary strategy is used to specify the target region in the new environment, and an explicit probability-density formulation is derived to compute the denoising update without neural training. To reduce the risk of misleading guidance caused by knee-point prediction errors, an uncertainty-aware scheme adaptively adjusts the guidance strength according to the historical prediction deviation. Experiments on the CEC2018 dynamic multiobjective benchmarks show that DD-DMOEA achieves competitive or better convergence-diversity performance and provides faster dynamic response than several state-of-the-art DMOEAs.

</details>


### [534] [ParaSpeechCLAP: A Dual-Encoder Speech-Text Model for Rich Stylistic Language-Audio Pretraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28737)
*Anuj Diwan,Eunsol Choi,David Harwath*

Main category: eess.AS

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: ParaSpeechCLAP是一个双编码器对比学习模型，将语音和文本风格描述映射到共同嵌入空间，支持广泛的内在（说话人层面）和情境（话语层面）风格描述，超越现有模型处理范围。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语音-文本对齐模型主要处理语义内容，对风格描述（如音高、音质、情感等）覆盖有限。需要开发能处理广泛风格维度的模型，支持更丰富的语音理解和生成任务。

Method: 采用双编码器对比学习架构，训练专门的ParaSpeechCLAP-Intrinsic（内在风格）和ParaSpeechCLAP-Situational（情境风格）模型，以及统一的ParaSpeechCLAP-Combined模型。内在风格模型还使用分类损失和类别平衡训练。

Result: 在风格描述检索、语音属性分类和作为推理时奖励模型改善风格提示TTS三个应用中，ParaSpeechCLAP在大多数指标上优于基线。专门化模型在单个风格维度表现更强，统一模型在组合评估中表现更好。

Conclusion: ParaSpeechCLAP成功建立了语音和文本风格描述的对齐，支持广泛的风格维度，在多个下游任务中表现优异，为语音理解和生成提供了强大的风格感知能力。

Abstract: We introduce ParaSpeechCLAP, a dual-encoder contrastive model that maps speech and text style captions into a common embedding space, supporting a wide range of intrinsic (speaker-level) and situational (utterance-level) descriptors (such as pitch, texture and emotion) far beyond the narrow set handled by existing models. We train specialized ParaSpeechCLAP-Intrinsic and ParaSpeechCLAP-Situational models alongside a unified ParaSpeechCLAP-Combined model, finding that specialization yields stronger performance on individual style dimensions while the unified model excels on compositional evaluation. We further show that ParaSpeechCLAP-Intrinsic benefits from an additional classification loss and class-balanced training. We demonstrate our models' performance on style caption retrieval, speech attribute classification and as an inference-time reward model that improves style-prompted TTS without additional training. ParaSpeechCLAP outperforms baselines on most metrics across all three applications. Our models and code are released at https://github.com/ajd12342/paraspeechclap .

</details>


### [535] [HASS: Hierarchical Simulation of Logopenic Aphasic Speech for Scalable PPA Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26795)
*Harrison Li,Kevin Wang,Cheol Jun Cho,Jiachen Lian,Rabab Rangwala,Chenxu Guo,Emma Yang,Lynn Kurteff,Zoe Ezzes,Willa Keegan-Rodewald,Jet Vonk,Siddarth Ramkrishnan,Giada Antonicelli,Zachary Miller,Marilu Gorno Tempini,Gopala Anumanchipalli*

Main category: eess.AS

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出HASS框架，通过分层模拟lvPPA的语义、音韵和时间缺陷，解决PPA诊断模型数据稀缺问题，提高检测准确性和泛化性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原发性进行性失语症（PPA）诊断模型面临数据稀缺挑战，临床数据收集困难且标注成本高。现有方法仅模拟孤立性言语障碍，不足以全面模拟PPA的多层次表型特征。

Method: 提出分层失语症语音模拟（HASS）框架，由临床专家系统识别lvPPA的语义、音韵和时间缺陷，并模拟不同严重程度的行为特征。

Result: HASS框架能够生成更全面的训练数据，使检测模型获得更高的准确性和更好的泛化能力。

Conclusion: HASS为PPA诊断提供了一种临床基础的数据增强方法，通过系统性模拟多层次缺陷，克服了数据稀缺问题，提升了模型性能。

Abstract: Building a diagnosis model for primary progressive aphasia (PPA) has been challenging due to the data scarcity. Collecting clinical data at scale is limited by the high vulnerability of clinical population and the high cost of expert labeling. To circumvent this, previous studies simulate dysfluent speech to generate training data. However, those approaches are not comprehensive enough to simulate PPA as holistic, multi-level phenotypes, instead relying on isolated dysfluencies. To address this, we propose a novel, clinically grounded simulation framework, Hierarchical Aphasic Speech Simulation (HASS). HASS aims to simulate behaviors of logopenic variant of PPA (lvPPA) with varying degrees of severity. To this end, semantic, phonological, and temporal deficits of lvPPA are systematically identified by clinical experts, and simulated. We demonstrate that our framework enables more accurate and generalizable detection models.

</details>


### [536] [Dual-branch Graph Domain Adaptation for Cross-scenario Multi-modal Emotion Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26840)
*Yuntao Shou,Jun Zhou,Tao Meng,Wei Ai,Keqin Li*

Main category: eess.AS

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出双分支图域适应框架(DGDA)解决多模态对话情感识别中的跨场景适应问题，首次同时处理域偏移和标签噪声


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界对话场景差异大（说话者、话题、风格、噪声水平不同），现有MERC方法忽视跨场景变化，限制了模型从源域到未见目标域的迁移能力

Method: 1)构建情感交互图表征话语间复杂情感依赖；2)设计双分支编码器（超图神经网络HGNN+路径神经网络PathNN）分别显式建模多元关系和隐式捕获全局依赖；3)引入域对抗判别器学习跨域不变表示；4)加入正则化损失抑制噪声标签负面影响

Result: 在IEMOCAP和MELD数据集上实验表明，DGDA持续优于强基线，能更好适应跨场景对话；理论分析提供了更紧的泛化边界

Conclusion: DGDA是首个同时解决域偏移和标签噪声的MERC框架，通过图域适应方法有效提升跨场景多模态情感识别的泛化能力

Abstract: Multimodal Emotion Recognition in Conversations (MERC) aims to predict speakers' emotional states in multi-turn dialogues through text, audio, and visual cues. In real-world settings, conversation scenarios differ significantly in speakers, topics, styles, and noise levels. Existing MERC methods generally neglect these cross-scenario variations, limiting their ability to transfer models trained on a source domain to unseen target domains. To address this issue, we propose a Dual-branch Graph Domain Adaptation framework (DGDA) for multimodal emotion recognition under cross-scenario conditions. We first construct an emotion interaction graph to characterize complex emotional dependencies among utterances. A dual-branch encoder, consisting of a hypergraph neural network (HGNN) and a path neural network (PathNN), is then designed to explicitly model multivariate relationships and implicitly capture global dependencies. To enable out-of-domain generalization, a domain adversarial discriminator is introduced to learn invariant representations across domains. Furthermore, a regularization loss is incorporated to suppress the negative influence of noisy labels. To the best of our knowledge, DGDA is the first MERC framework that jointly addresses domain shift and label noise. Theoretical analysis provides tighter generalization bounds, and extensive experiments on IEMOCAP and MELD demonstrate that DGDA consistently outperforms strong baselines and better adapts to cross-scenario conversations. Our code is available at https://github.com/Xudmm1239439/DGDA-Net.

</details>


### [537] [Uncertainty-Aware Mapping from 3D Keypoints to Anatomical Landmarks for Markerless Biomechanics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26844)
*Cesare Davide Pace,Alessandro Marco De Nunzio,Claudio De Stefano,Francesco Fontanella,Mario Molinara*

Main category: eess.IV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该研究提出使用预测不确定性作为无标记生物力学中3D关键点到解剖标志点映射的质量控制工具，通过建模观测噪声和模型不确定性，实现了对帧级可靠性的定量评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前无标记生物力学分析通常将视频提取的3D骨骼关键点视为确定性估计，缺乏对帧级质量的系统控制机制。研究旨在解决如何为关键点到解剖标志点的映射提供置信度量化，这是逆运动学和肌肉骨骼分析的关键预处理步骤。

Method: 在时间学习框架内，同时建模观测噪声引起的不确定性和模型局限性引起的不确定性。使用AMASS数据集上的同步运动捕捉真值进行评估，通过误差-不确定性秩相关、风险-覆盖分析和灾难性异常值检测等方法，在帧级和关节级评估不确定性。

Result: 不确定性估计（特别是模型不确定性）与标志点误差呈现强单调关联（Spearman ρ≈0.63），能够选择性保留可靠帧（10%覆盖时误差降至≈16.8mm），并准确检测严重失败（误差>50mm时ROC-AUC≈0.92）。在输入退化（高斯噪声和模拟缺失关节）下可靠性排名保持稳定。

Conclusion: 预测不确定性可作为无标记生物力学流程中实用的帧级自动质量控制工具。模型不确定性在该映射任务中起主导作用，而观测噪声不确定性提供的额外收益有限。

Abstract: Markerless biomechanics increasingly relies on 3D skeletal keypoints extracted from video, yet downstream biomechanical mappings typically treat these estimates as deterministic, providing no principled mechanism for frame-wise quality control. In this work, we investigate predictive uncertainty as a quantitative measure of confidence for mapping 3D pose keypoints to 3D anatomical landmarks, a critical step preceding inverse kinematics and musculoskeletal analysis.
  Within a temporal learning framework, we model both uncertainty arising from observation noise and uncertainty related to model limitations. Using synchronized motion capture ground truth on AMASS, we evaluate uncertainty at frame and joint level through error--uncertainty rank correlation, risk--coverage analysis, and catastrophic outlier detection.
  Across experiments, uncertainty estimates, particularly those associated with model uncertainty, exhibit a strong monotonic association with landmark error (Spearman $ρ\approx 0.63$), enabling selective retention of reliable frames (error reduced to $\approx 16.8$ mm at 10% coverage) and accurate detection of severe failures (ROC-AUC $\approx 0.92$ for errors $>50$ mm). Reliability ranking remains stable under controlled input degradation, including Gaussian noise and simulated missing joints. In contrast, uncertainty attributable to observation noise provides limited additional benefit in this setting, suggesting that dominant failures in keypoint-to-landmark mapping are driven primarily by model uncertainty.
  Our results establish predictive uncertainty as a practical, frame-wise tool for automatic quality control in markerless biomechanical pipelines.

</details>


### [538] [AFSS: Artifact-Focused Self-Synthesis for Mitigating Bias in Audio Deepfake Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26856)
*Hai-Son Nguyen-Le,Hung-Cuong Nguyen-Thanh,Nhien-An Le-Khac,Dinh-Thuc Nguyen,Hong-Hanh Nguyen-Le*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出AFSS方法解决音频深度伪造检测器的偏差问题，通过自转换和自重建生成伪伪造样本，强制检测器关注生成伪影而非混杂因素，实现跨数据集泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前音频深度伪造检测器存在严重的偏差问题，导致在未见数据集上泛化能力差。现有方法依赖预收集的伪造数据集，存在偏差且无法适应新数据。

Method: 提出AFSS方法：1）通过自转换和自重建机制从真实音频生成伪伪造样本；2）强制真实样本和伪伪造样本具有相同的说话人身份和语义内容；3）引入可学习的重加权损失动态强调合成样本。

Result: 在7个数据集上达到SOTA性能，平均EER为5.45%，在WaveFake上降至1.23%，In-the-Wild上降至2.70%，且无需预收集伪造数据集。

Conclusion: AFSS通过自合成方法有效缓解检测器偏差问题，强制模型关注生成伪影，显著提升跨数据集泛化能力，为音频深度伪造检测提供新思路。

Abstract: The rapid advancement of generative models has enabled highly realistic audio deepfakes, yet current detectors suffer from a critical bias problem, leading to poor generalization across unseen datasets. This paper proposes Artifact-Focused Self-Synthesis (AFSS), a method designed to mitigate this bias by generating pseudo-fake samples from real audio via two mechanisms: self-conversion and self-reconstruction. The core insight of AFSS lies in enforcing same-speaker constraints, ensuring that real and pseudo-fake samples share identical speaker identity and semantic content. This forces the detector to focus exclusively on generation artifacts rather than irrelevant confounding factors. Furthermore, we introduce a learnable reweighting loss to dynamically emphasize synthetic samples during training. Extensive experiments across 7 datasets demonstrate that AFSS achieves state-of-the-art performance with an average EER of 5.45\%, including a significant reduction to 1.23\% on WaveFake and 2.70\% on In-the-Wild, all while eliminating the dependency on pre-collected fake datasets. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/NguyenLeHaiSonGit/AFSS.

</details>


### [539] [Online Statistical Inference of Constant Sample-averaged Q-Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26982)
*Saunak Kumar Panda,Tong Li,Ruiqi Liu,Yisha Xiang*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一个基于样本平均Q学习的统计在线推断框架，使用函数中心极限定理和随机缩放构建Q值置信区间，在网格世界和动态资源匹配问题上验证覆盖率和区间宽度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习算法在决策任务中广泛应用，但在噪声或稀疏奖励环境中存在高方差和不稳定性问题，需要统计推断方法来量化不确定性。

Method: 提出样本平均Q学习框架，应用函数中心极限定理(FCLT)在一般条件下推导理论性质，使用随机缩放方法构建Q值的置信区间。

Result: 在网格世界(简单示例)和动态资源匹配(实际应用)两个问题上进行实验，比较改进方法和传统Q学习的覆盖率和置信区间宽度。

Conclusion: 提出的统计在线推断框架能够有效量化Q学习的不确定性，为强化学习算法的可靠性评估提供统计工具。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning algorithms have been widely used for decision-making tasks in various domains. However, the performance of these algorithms can be impacted by high variance and instability, particularly in environments with noise or sparse rewards. In this paper, we propose a framework to perform statistical online inference for a sample-averaged Q-learning approach. We adapt the functional central limit theorem (FCLT) for the modified algorithm under some general conditions and then construct confidence intervals for the Q-values via random scaling. We conduct experiments to perform inference on both the modified approach and its traditional counterpart, Q-learning using random scaling and report their coverage rates and confidence interval widths on two problems: a grid world problem as a simple toy example and a dynamic resource-matching problem as a real-world example for comparison between the two solution approaches.

</details>


### [540] [Autonomous Agent-Orchestrated Digital Twins (AADT): Leveraging the OpenClaw Framework for State Synchronization in Rare Genetic Disorders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27104)
*Hongzhuo Chen,Zhanliang Wang,Quan M. Nguyen,Gongbo Zhang,Chunhua Weng,Kai Wang*

Main category: q-bio.QM

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出基于智能体编排的自主数字孪生（AADT）框架，通过OpenClaw的"心跳"机制和模块化Agent技能，实现医疗数字孪生的实时同步更新，特别针对罕见遗传病中表型、基因组解释和护理指南的动态变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前医疗数字孪生（MDTs）大多是静态或被动更新的，存在关键的同步差距，特别是在罕见遗传病领域，表型、基因组解释和护理指南会随时间演变。需要解决MDT实时同步的关键瓶颈。

Method: 采用智能体编排的数字孪生框架，使用OpenClaw的主动"心跳"机制和模块化Agent技能。系统持续监控本地和外部数据流（如患者报告的表型和变异分类数据库更新），执行自动化的数据摄取、规范化、状态更新和基于触发的分析工作流。

Result: 原型实现表明智能体编排能够持续同步MDT状态与纵向表型更新和演变的基因组知识。在罕见病环境中，这实现了更早的诊断和更准确的疾病进展建模。通过两个案例研究（变异重新解释和纵向表型跟踪）展示了AADT如何支持及时、可审计的更新。

Conclusion: AADT框架解决了MDT中实时同步的关键瓶颈，实现了可扩展和持续更新的患者模型。同时讨论了数据安全考虑和通过人在回路系统设计的缓解策略。

Abstract: Background: Medical Digital Twins (MDTs) are computational representations of individual patients that integrate clinical, genomic, and physiological data to support diagnosis, treatment planning, and outcome prediction. However, most MDTs remain static or passively updated, creating a critical synchronization gap, especially in rare genetic disorders where phenotypes, genomic interpretations, and care guidelines evolve over time.
  Methods: We propose an agent-orchestrated digital twin framework using OpenClaw's proactive "heartbeat" mechanism and modular Agent Skills. This Autonomous Agent-orchestrated Digital Twin (AADT) system continuously monitors local and external data streams (e.g., patient-reported phenotypes and updates in variant classification databases) and executes automated workflows for data ingestion, normalization, state updates, and trigger-based analysis.
  Results: A prototype implementation demonstrates that agent orchestration can continuously synchronize MDT states with both longitudinal phenotype updates and evolving genomic knowledge. In rare disease settings, this enables earlier diagnosis and more accurate modeling of disease progression. We present two case studies, including variant reinterpretation and longitudinal phenotype tracking, highlighting how AADTs support timely, auditable updates for both research and clinical care.
  Conclusion: The AADT framework addresses the key bottleneck of real-time synchronization in MDTs, enabling scalable and continuously updated patient models. We also discuss data security considerations and mitigation strategies through human-in-the-loop system design.

</details>


### [541] [Bayes-MICE: A Bayesian Approach to Multiple Imputation for Time Series Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27142)
*Amuche Ibenegbu,Pierre Lafaye de Micheaux,Rohitash Chandra*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 贝叶斯MICE方法：将MICE扩展到贝叶斯框架，使用MCMC采样处理时间序列缺失数据，考虑参数和插补值的不确定性，结合时间滞后特征，在环境和临床数据集上表现优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间序列分析中缺失数据是常见问题，传统MICE方法虽然流行但未充分考虑参数不确定性。需要一种能处理时间序列特性并量化不确定性的插补方法。

Method: 扩展MICE到贝叶斯框架，使用MCMC采样（RWM和MALA两种采样器），加入时间感知初始化和时间滞后特征，在AirQuality和PhysioNet数据集上评估。

Result: 贝叶斯MICE在所有变量上减少插补误差，提供更准确的误差度量；MALA比RWM收敛更快，达到可比精度且后验探索更一致。

Conclusion: 贝叶斯MICE框架是实用高效的时间序列插补方法，在提高准确性的同时有意义地量化不确定性，适用于环境和临床场景。

Abstract: Time-series analysis is often affected by missing data, a common problem across several fields, including healthcare and environmental monitoring.
  Multiple Imputation by Chained Equations (MICE) has been prominent for imputing missing values through "fully conditional specification". We extend MICE using the Bayesian framework (Bayes-MICE), utilising Bayesian inference to impute missing values via Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) sampling to account for uncertainty in MICE model parameters and imputed values. We also include temporally informed initialisation and time-lagged features in the model to respect the sequential nature of time-series data. We evaluate the Bayes-MICE method using two real-world datasets (AirQuality and PhysioNet), and using both the Random Walk Metropolis (RWM) and the Metropolis-Adjusted Langevin Algorithm (MALA) samplers. Our results demonstrate that Bayes-MICE reduces imputation errors relative to the baseline methods over all variables and accounts for uncertainty in the imputation process, thereby providing a more accurate measure of imputation error. We also found that MALA converges faster than RWM, achieving comparable accuracy while providing more consistent posterior exploration. Overall, these findings suggest that the Bayes-MICE framework represents a practical and efficient approach to time-series imputation, balancing increased accuracy with meaningful quantification of uncertainty in various environmental and clinical settings.

</details>


### [542] [An End-to-end Flight Control Network for High-speed UAV Obstacle Avoidance based on Event-Depth Fusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27181)
*Dikai Shang,Jingyue Zhao,Shi Xu,Nanyang Ye,Lei Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一种用于高速自主飞行的端到端控制网络，通过双向交叉注意力实现深度图像与事件数据的特征级融合，结合高效的专家规划器生成高质量监督数据，在复杂环境中实现更可靠的避障。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单一感知模态在复杂环境中的局限性：深度相机对静态物体有效但在高速下易出现运动模糊，事件相机擅长捕捉快速运动但对静态场景感知不足。需要融合两种传感器的互补优势以实现高速自主飞行中的可靠避障。

Method: 1) 端到端飞行控制网络：通过双向交叉注意力模块实现深度图像和事件数据的特征级融合；2) 模仿学习训练：使用高质量专家轨迹作为监督；3) 高效专家规划器：采用球面主搜索算法，将计算复杂度从O(n²)降至O(n)，生成更平滑的轨迹。

Result: 在17m/s速度下达到70-80%的成功率，比单模态和单向融合模型高出10-20%；专家规划器在17m/s下达到超过80%的成功率，比传统规划器高出近20%。

Conclusion: 双向融合能有效整合事件和深度信息，在包含静态和动态物体的复杂环境中实现更可靠的避障，为高速自主飞行提供了有效的多模态感知解决方案。

Abstract: Achieving safe, high-speed autonomous flight in complex environments with static, dynamic, or mixed obstacles remains challenging, as a single perception modality is incomplete. Depth cameras are effective for static objects but suffer from motion blur at high speeds. Conversely, event cameras excel at capturing rapid motion but struggle to perceive static scenes. To exploit the complementary strengths of both sensors, we propose an end-to-end flight control network that achieves feature-level fusion of depth images and event data through a bidirectional crossattention module. The end-to-end network is trained via imitation learning, which relies on high-quality supervision. Building on this insight, we design an efficient expert planner using Spherical Principal Search (SPS). This planner reduces computational complexity from $O(n^2)$ to $O(n)$ while generating smoother trajectories, achieving over 80% success rate at 17m/s--nearly 20% higher than traditional planners. Simulation experiments show that our method attains a 70-80% success rate at 17 m/s across varied scenes, surpassing single-modality and unidirectional fusion models by 10-20%. These results demonstrate that bidirectional fusion effectively integrates event and depth information, enabling more reliable obstacle avoidance in complex environments with both static and dynamic objects.

</details>


### [543] [Multi-AUV Ad-hoc Networks-Based Multi-Target Tracking Based on Scene-Adaptive Embodied Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27194)
*Kai Tian,Jialun Wang,Chuan Lin,Guangjie Han,Shengchao Zhu,Ying Liu,Qian Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种面向多AUV自组织网络的场景自适应具身智能架构，通过三层功能框架和双路径批评家机制的SA-MARL算法，解决了水下动态拓扑变化和带宽限制下的多目标跟踪问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统以数据为中心的架构在高度动态拓扑波动和严重受限的水声通信带宽下难以保持操作一致性，需要新的架构来应对水下多AUV网络的挑战。

Method: 提出场景自适应具身智能架构，将AUV重新构想为具身实体，集成感知、决策和物理执行到统一认知循环中。采用基于信标的通信控制模型，并引入SA-MARL算法，该算法具有双路径批评家机制（场景批评家网络和通用批评家网络），通过权重动态融合过程实现专业跟踪任务与全局安全约束的解耦。

Result: 评估结果表明，该方案显著加速了策略收敛，相比主流MARL方法实现了更优的跟踪精度，即使在强烈环境干扰和流体拓扑变化下也能保持鲁棒性能。

Conclusion: 提出的场景自适应具身智能架构为多AUV自组织网络提供了一种有效的解决方案，通过将AUV视为具身实体并采用创新的MARL算法，成功解决了水下动态环境中的多目标跟踪挑战。

Abstract: With the rapid advancement of underwater net-working and multi-agent coordination technologies, autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV) ad-hoc networks have emerged as a pivotal framework for executing complex maritime missions, such as multi-target tracking. However, traditional data-centricarchitectures struggle to maintain operational consistency under highly dynamic topological fluctuations and severely constrained acoustic communication bandwidth. This article proposes a scene-adaptive embodied intelligence (EI) architecture for multi-AUV ad-hoc networks, which re-envisions AUVs as embodied entities by integrating perception, decision-making, and physical execution into a unified cognitive loop. To materialize the functional interaction between these layers, we define a beacon-based communication and control model that treats the communication link as a dynamic constraint-aware channel, effectively bridging the gap between high-level policy inference and decentralized physical actuation. Specifically, the proposed architecture employs a three-layer functional framework and introduces a Scene-Adaptive MARL (SA-MARL) algorithm featuring a dual-path critic mechanism. By integrating a scene critic network and a general critic network through a weight-based dynamic fusion process, SA-MARL effectively decouples specialized tracking tasks from global safety constraints, facilitating autonomous policy evolution. Evaluation results demonstrate that the proposedscheme significantly accelerates policy convergence and achieves superior tracking accuracy compared to mainstream MARL approaches, maintaining robust performance even under intense environmental interference and fluid topological shifts.

</details>


### [544] [Can pre-trained Deep Learning models predict groove ratings?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27237)
*Axel Marmoret,Nicolas Farrugia,Jan Alexander Stupacher*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该研究探索深度学习模型直接从音频信号预测律动感知的能力，比较了七种SOTA模型与传统手工特征，并通过源分离分析不同乐器的贡献，发现深度学习能有效捕捉风格依赖的律动特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探索深度学习模型是否能够直接从音频信号中预测复杂的音乐感知概念——律动及其相关维度，以评估深度学习在音乐信息检索中的潜力。

Method: 方法包括：1）使用七种SOTA深度学习模型提取音频嵌入来预测律动评分；2）与传统手工音频特征进行对比；3）通过源分离技术分析不同乐器对律动预测的贡献；4）在funk、pop、rock三种音乐风格上进行实验。

Result: 结果显示：1）深度学习模型能成功预测律动评分；2）不同音乐风格（funk、pop、rock）的律动特征有明显分离；3）深度学习音频表示能捕捉传统特征常忽略的风格依赖律动成分；4）源分离分析揭示了不同乐器对律动感知的贡献。

Conclusion: 结论是深度学习模型能够有效捕捉复杂的、风格依赖的律动概念，展示了表示学习在推进预测性音乐信息检索方法方面的强大潜力。

Abstract: This study explores the extent to which deep learning models can predict groove and its related perceptual dimensions directly from audio signals. We critically examine the effectiveness of seven state-of-the-art deep learning models in predicting groove ratings and responses to groove-related queries through the extraction of audio embeddings. Additionally, we compare these predictions with traditional handcrafted audio features. To better understand the underlying mechanics, we extend this methodology to analyze predictions based on source-separated instruments, thereby isolating the contributions of individual musical elements. Our analysis reveals a clear separation of groove characteristics driven by the underlying musical style of the tracks (funk, pop, and rock). These findings indicate that deep audio representations can successfully encode complex, style-dependent groove components that traditional features often miss. Ultimately, this work highlights the capacity of advanced deep learning models to capture the multifaceted concept of groove, demonstrating the strong potential of representation learning to advance predictive Music Information Retrieval methodologies.

</details>


### [545] [From Foundation ECG Models to NISQ Learners: Distilling ECGFounder into a VQC Student](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27269)
*Giovanni dos Santos Franco,Felipe Mahlow,Ellison Fernando Cardoso,Felipe Fanchini*

Main category: quant-ph

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该研究探索了知识蒸馏将大型ECG基础模型（ECGFounder）压缩为轻量级学生模型，包括经典1D网络和量子就绪管道，在ECG分类任务上实现了参数大幅减少下的竞争性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ECG基础模型虽然提升了心电图表示学习，但计算成本和延迟限制了实际部署。需要探索如何将高容量教师模型的预测能力转移到更紧凑的学生模型上，以平衡性能与效率。

Method: 1. 微调ECGFounder作为高容量教师模型进行ECG二分类；2. 使用知识蒸馏将教师知识转移到两类学生模型：经典1D网络（ResNet-1D和轻量CNN-1D）和量子就绪管道（卷积自编码器+6量子比特变分量子电路）；3. 在PTB-XL和MIT-BIH心律失常数据库上评估；4. 分析学生模型对蒸馏设置的敏感性。

Result: 教师模型在所有数据集上表现最强，而蒸馏产生的学生模型在可训练参数大幅减少的情况下仍具有竞争力。研究揭示了压缩ECG基础模型到经典和量子就绪学习器时一致的准确率-效率权衡。

Conclusion: 知识蒸馏能够有效将大型ECG基础模型的预测能力转移到紧凑的学生模型，包括经典和量子就绪架构，为ECG分析的实际部署提供了可行的效率-性能平衡方案。

Abstract: Foundation models have recently improved electrocardiogram (ECG) representation learning, but their deployment can be limited by computational cost and latency constraints. In this work, we fine-tune ECGFounder as a high-capacity teacher for binary ECG classification on PTB-XL and the MIT-BIH Arrhythmia Database, and investigate whether knowledge distillation can transfer its predictive behavior to compact students. We evaluate two classical 1D students (ResNet-1D and a lightweight CNN-1D) and a quantum-ready pipeline that combines a convolutional autoencoder, which compresses 256-sample ECG windows into a low-dimensional latent representation, with a 6-qubit variational quantum circuit implemented in Qiskit and executed in a simulated backend. Across both datasets, the teacher provides the strongest overall performance, while distillation yields competitive students under a considerable reduction in trainable parameters. We further analyze the sensitivity of student performance to distillation settings, highlighting consistent accuracy--efficiency trade-offs when compressing a foundation ECG model into classical and quantum-ready learners under a unified evaluation protocol.

</details>


### [546] [Robust Global-Local Behavior Arbitration via Continuous Command Fusion Under LiDAR Errors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27273)
*Mohamed Elgouhary,Amr S. El-Wakeel*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种ROS2原生的仲裁模块，融合全局路径跟踪控制器和局部避障控制器的输出，使用PPO训练的策略进行连续门控，在感知受损条件下评估自动驾驶系统的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模块化自动驾驶系统需要在全局进度目标和局部安全反应之间协调，同时面临不完美感知和实时约束。现有系统缺乏在感知受损条件下的鲁棒性评估框架。

Method: 1. 设计ROS2原生仲裁模块，融合Pure Pursuit全局控制器和LiDAR间隙跟随局部控制器
2. 使用PPO训练的策略从紧凑特征观测预测连续门控值
3. 实现轻量级采样预测基线作为对比
4. 开发ROS2感知受损协议，注入LiDAR噪声、延迟、丢包和虚假短程异常值

Result: 在近距离通过场景中，随着感知压力增加，报告了安全成功率、失败率以及每步端到端控制器运行时间。PPO训练的仲裁策略在感知受损条件下表现出更好的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该研究提供了一个模块化ROS2环境下的命令级鲁棒性评估框架，而非替代规划级交互推理。证明了融合可解释控制器与学习策略在自动驾驶鲁棒性方面的价值。

Abstract: Modular autonomous driving systems must coordinate global progress objectives with local safety-driven reactions under imperfect sensing and strict real-time constraints. This paper presents a ROS2-native arbitration module that continuously fuses the outputs of two unchanged and interpretable controllers: a global reference-tracking controller based on Pure Pursuit and a reactive LiDAR-based Gap Follow controller. At each control step, both controllers propose Ackermann commands, and a PPO-trained policy predicts a continuous gate from a compact feature observation to produce a single fused drive command, augmented with practical safety checks. For comparison under identical ROS topic inputs and control rate, we implement a lightweight sampling-based predictive baseline. Robustness is evaluated using a ROS2 impairment protocol that injects LiDAR noise, delay, and dropout, and additionally sweeps forward-cone false short-range outliers. In a repeatable close-proximity passing scenario, we report safe success and failure rates together with per-step end-to-end controller runtime as sensing stress increases. The study is intended as a command-level robustness evaluation in a modular ROS2 setting, not as a replacement for planning-level interaction reasoning.

</details>


### [547] [D-SPEAR: Dual-Stream Prioritized Experience Adaptive Replay for Stable Reinforcement Learninging Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27346)
*Yu Zhang,Karl Mason*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: D-SPEAR：一种用于机器人强化学习的双流优先经验回放框架，通过分离actor和critic的采样策略，提高训练稳定性和最终性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人操作任务对强化学习具有挑战性，包括接触丰富的动力学、长视野和训练不稳定性。虽然SAC、TD3等离策略actor-critic算法在模拟中表现良好，但在实际设置中常出现策略振荡和性能崩溃问题，部分原因是经验回放策略忽略了actor和critic的不同数据需求。

Method: 提出D-SPEAR：双流优先经验自适应回放框架。该框架解耦actor和critic的采样，同时维护共享回放缓冲区。critic利用优先回放进行高效价值学习，actor使用低误差转换来稳定策略优化。自适应锚机制基于TD误差的变异系数平衡均匀采样和优先采样，Huber-based critic目标进一步提高了异质奖励尺度下的鲁棒性。

Result: 在robosuite基准测试的挑战性机器人操作任务（包括Block-Lifting和Door-Opening）上评估D-SPEAR。结果表明，D-SPEAR在最终性能和训练稳定性方面始终优于SAC、TD3和DDPG等强基线，消融研究确认了actor侧和critic侧回放流的互补作用。

Conclusion: D-SPEAR通过解耦actor和critic的采样需求，提供了一种有效的经验回放策略，显著提高了机器人强化学习的训练稳定性和性能表现。

Abstract: Robotic manipulation remains challenging for reinforcement learning due to contact-rich dynamics, long horizons, and training instability. Although off-policy actor-critic algorithms such as SAC and TD3 perform well in simulation, they often suffer from policy oscillations and performance collapse in realistic settings, partly due to experience replay strategies that ignore the differing data requirements of the actor and the critic. We propose D-SPEAR: Dual-Stream Prioritized Experience Adaptive Replay, a replay framework that decouples actor and critic sampling while maintaining a shared replay buffer. The critic leverages prioritized replay for efficient value learning, whereas the actor is updated using low-error transitions to stabilize policy optimization. An adaptive anchor mechanism balances uniform and prioritized sampling based on the coefficient of variation of TD errors, and a Huber-based critic objective further improves robustness under heterogeneous reward scales. We evaluate D-SPEAR on challenging robotic manipulation tasks from the robosuite benchmark, including Block-Lifting and Door-Opening. Results demonstrate that D-SPEAR consistently outperforms strong off-policy baselines, including SAC, TD3, and DDPG, in both final performance and training stability, with ablation studies confirming the complementary roles of the actorside and critic-side replay streams.

</details>


### [548] [CarbonEdge: Carbon-Aware Deep Learning Inference Framework for Sustainable Edge Computing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27420)
*Guilin Zhang,Wulan Guo,Ziqi Tan,Hailong Jiang*

Main category: cs.DC

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: CarbonEdge：一个碳感知的深度学习推理框架，通过模型分区、碳排放估算和绿色调度，在边缘计算环境中减少AI推理的碳足迹


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘计算中的深度学习应用导致AI相关碳排放显著增长，现有边缘计算框架主要优化延迟和吞吐量，但忽略了推理工作负载的环境影响，存在可持续性挑战

Method: 扩展自适应模型分区技术，结合碳排放估算和绿色调度能力；提出碳感知调度算法，扩展传统加权评分方法，引入碳效率指标，支持可调节的性能-碳排放权衡

Result: 在Docker模拟的异构边缘环境中，CarbonEdge-Green模式相比单体执行减少22.9%碳排放；碳效率提升1.3倍（245.8 vs 189.5推理/克CO2）；调度开销极低（每个任务0.03ms）

Conclusion: 该框架展示了可持续边缘AI部署的潜力，为研究者和从业者提供了量化和最小化分布式深度学习推理环境足迹的工具

Abstract: Deep learning applications at the network edge lead to a significant growth in AI-related carbon emissions, presenting a critical sustainability challenge. The existing edge computing frameworks optimize for latency and throughput, but they largely ignore the environmental impact of inference workloads. This paper introduces CarbonEdge, a carbon-aware deep learning inference framework that extends adaptive model partitioning with carbon footprint estimation and green scheduling apabilities. We propose a carbon-aware scheduling algorithm that extends traditional weighted scoring with a carbon efficiency metric, supporting a tunable performance--carbon trade-off (demonstrated via weight sweep). Experimental evaluations on Docker-simulated heterogeneous edge environments show that CarbonEdge-Green mode achieves a 22.9% reduction in carbon emissions compared to monolithic execution. The framework achieves 1.3x improvement in carbon efficiency (245.8 vs 189.5 inferences per gram CO2) with negligible scheduling overhead (0.03ms per task). These results highlight the framework's potential for sustainable edge AI deployment, providing researchers and practitioners a tool to quantify and minimize the environmental footprint of distributed deep learning inference.

</details>


### [549] [A General Model for Deepfake Speech Detection: Diverse Bonafide Resources or Diverse AI-Based Generators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27557)
*Lam Pham,Khoi Vu,Dat Tran,David Fischinger,Simon Freitter,Marcel Hasenbalg,Davide Antonutti,Alexander Schindler,Martin Boyer,Ian McLoughlin*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文分析了影响深度伪造语音检测模型性能和泛化能力的两个主要因素：真实资源(BR)和AI生成器(AG)，通过实验证明两者的平衡是训练通用检测模型的关键。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度伪造语音检测模型在实际应用中面临泛化能力不足的问题，作者认为这主要源于训练数据中真实资源(BR)和AI生成器(AG)的不平衡分布，需要系统分析这两个因素对检测性能的影响。

Method: 1) 提出基线深度学习模型；2) 实验分析BR和AG因素对检测阈值的影响；3) 构建平衡BR和AG的数据集；4) 在不同基准数据集上进行跨数据集评估。

Result: 实验结果表明，BR和AG的平衡是训练通用深度伪造语音检测模型的关键因素，基于平衡数据集训练的模型在跨数据集评估中表现更好。

Conclusion: 深度伪造语音检测模型的泛化能力取决于训练数据中真实资源和AI生成器的平衡，平衡的数据集设计对于构建鲁棒的检测系统至关重要。

Abstract: In this paper, we analyze two main factors of Bonafide Resource (BR) or AI-based Generator (AG) which affect the performance and the generality of a Deepfake Speech Detection (DSD) model. To this end, we first propose a deep-learning based model, referred to as the baseline. Then, we conducted experiments on the baseline by which we indicate how Bonafide Resource (BR) and AI-based Generator (AG) factors affect the threshold score used to detect fake or bonafide input audio in the inference process. Given the experimental results, a dataset, which re-uses public Deepfake Speech Detection (DSD) datasets and shows a balance between Bonafide Resource (BR) or AI-based Generator (AG), is proposed. We then train various deep-learning based models on the proposed dataset and conduct cross-dataset evaluation on different benchmark datasets. The cross-dataset evaluation results prove that the balance of Bonafide Resources (BR) and AI-based Generators (AG) is the key factor to train and achieve a general Deepfake Speech Detection (DSD) model.

</details>


### [550] [ContraMap: Contrastive Uncertainty Mapping for Robot Environment Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27632)
*Chi Cuong Le,Weiming Zhi*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: ContraMap是一种对比连续映射方法，通过合成噪声样本训练显式不确定性类别，实现实时环境预测和空间不确定性估计，无需贝叶斯推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可靠的机器人感知不仅需要预测场景结构，还需要识别哪些预测由于稀疏或缺失观测而不可靠。现有方法在处理未观测区域的不确定性方面存在不足。

Method: 基于核的判别式映射方法，引入显式不确定性类别，使用合成噪声样本训练对比学习框架，将未观测区域作为对比类别处理。

Result: 在2D占据映射、3D语义映射和桌面场景重建实验中，ContraMap保持了映射质量，产生空间一致的不确定性估计，且比贝叶斯核映射基线方法效率显著更高。

Conclusion: ContraMap提供了一种高效的方法来联合预测环境和估计空间不确定性，适用于实时机器人感知任务。

Abstract: Reliable robot perception requires not only predicting scene structure, but also identifying where predictions should be treated as unreliable due to sparse or missing observations. We present ContraMap, a contrastive continuous mapping method that augments kernel-based discriminative maps with an explicit uncertainty class trained using synthetic noise samples. This formulation treats unobserved regions as a contrastive class, enabling joint environment prediction and spatial uncertainty estimation in real time without Bayesian inference. Under a simple mixture-model view, we show that the probability assigned to the uncertainty class is a monotonic function of a distance-aware uncertainty surrogate. Experiments in 2D occupancy mapping, 3D semantic mapping, and tabletop scene reconstruction show that ContraMap preserves mapping quality, produces spatially coherent uncertainty estimates, and is substantially more efficient than Bayesian kernelmap baselines.

</details>


### [551] [A Revealed Preference Framework for AI Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27868)
*Elchin Suleymanov*

Main category: econ.TH

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了Luce对齐模型，研究AI代理是否遵循人类偏好还是追求自身偏好。通过混合两个Luce规则，在实验室和现场两种设置下识别AI对齐程度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着人类决策者越来越多地将选择委托给AI代理，一个自然的问题是：AI是实施人类委托者的偏好还是追求自己的偏好？为了使用显示偏好技术研究这个问题，作者提出了Luce对齐模型。

Method: 引入Luce对齐模型，其中AI的选择是两个Luce规则的混合：一个反映人类偏好，另一个反映AI自身偏好。证明在两种设置下可以识别AI对齐程度：实验室设置（观察人类和AI选择）和现场设置（仅观察AI选择）。

Result: AI的对齐程度（人类和AI偏好的相似性）可以在两种设置下被识别：实验室设置中同时观察人类和AI选择，现场设置中仅观察AI选择。

Conclusion: 该模型为研究AI代理是否遵循人类偏好提供了理论框架，通过显示偏好技术可以在不同观察条件下识别AI的对齐程度。

Abstract: Human decision makers increasingly delegate choices to AI agents, raising a natural question: does the AI implement the human principal's preferences or pursue its own? To study this question using revealed preference techniques, I introduce the Luce Alignment Model, where the AI's choices are a mixture of two Luce rules, one reflecting the human's preferences and the other the AI's. I show that the AI's alignment (similarity of human and AI preferences) can be generically identified in two settings: the laboratory setting, where both human and AI choices are observed, and the field setting, where only AI choices are observed.

</details>


### [552] [Synonymix: Unified Group Personas for Generative Simulations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28066)
*Huanxing Chen,Aditesh Kumar*

Main category: cs.HC

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出Synonymix框架，通过图抽象和合并构建"unigraph"，实现生成式智能体模拟的中间尺度（meso-level），在保留行为信号的同时提供隐私保护


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前生成式智能体模拟主要关注个体角色交互和群体行为分析两个尺度，缺乏中间尺度的模拟能力。需要一种能够保留个体丰富经验基础，同时提供群体层面可查询表示的方法

Method: 提出Synonymix框架：1) 从多个生命故事角色构建图表示；2) 通过图抽象和合并创建"unigraph"；3) 支持查询式探索和合成角色生成；4) 提供隐私保护机制

Result: 在General Social Survey项目上评估合成智能体，显示行为信号保留显著优于人口统计基线（p<0.001, r=0.59），同时提供可证明的隐私保证（最大来源贡献<13%）

Conclusion: 中间尺度模拟为生成式智能体提供了新的交互模式，但提出了关于"高保真"角色是否能真正捕捉生活经验质感的哲学问题

Abstract: Generative agent simulations operate at two scales: individual personas for character interaction, and population models for collective behavior analysis and intervention testing. We propose a third scale: meso-level simulation - interaction with group-level representations that retain grounding in rich individual experience. To enable this, we present Synonymix, a pipeline that constructs a "unigraph" from multiple life story personas via graph-based abstraction and merging, producing a queryable collective representation that can be explored for sensemaking or sampled for synthetic persona generation. Evaluating synthetic agents on General Social Survey items, we demonstrate behavioral signal preservation beyond demographic baselines (p<0.001, r=0.59) with demonstrable privacy guarantee (max source contribution <13%). We invite discussion on interaction modalities enabled by meso-level simulations, and whether "high-fidelity" personas can ever capture the texture of lived experience.

</details>


### [553] [Transcription and Recognition of Italian Parliamentary Speeches Using Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28103)
*Luigi Curini,Alfio Ferrara,Giovanni Pagano,Sergio Picascia*

Main category: cs.DL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出基于视觉语言模型的意大利议会演讲自动转录、语义分割和实体链接管道，相比传统OCR方法显著提升转录质量和说话人标注准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 议会记录是计算分析的重要资源，但历史扫描文档难以处理。现有意大利议会演讲转录依赖传统OCR管道，导致转录错误多且语义标注有限，需要更先进的解决方案。

Method: 1) 使用专门OCR模型提取文本并保持阅读顺序；2) 采用大规模视觉语言模型联合推理视觉布局和文本内容，进行转录精炼、元素分类和说话人识别；3) 通过SPARQL查询和多策略模糊匹配将说话人链接到众议院知识库。

Result: 在已有基准测试中，该方法在转录质量和说话人标注方面都取得了显著改进，证明视觉语言模型在文档理解任务上的优越性。

Conclusion: 基于视觉语言模型的管道能有效处理历史议会文档，提升转录准确性和语义标注质量，为议会记录分析提供了更可靠的技术方案。

Abstract: Parliamentary proceedings represent a rich yet challenging resource for computational analysis, particularly when preserved only as scanned historical documents. Existing efforts to transcribe Italian parliamentary speeches have relied on traditional Optical Character Recognition pipelines, resulting in transcription errors and limited semantic annotation. In this paper, we propose a pipeline based on Vision-Language Models for the automatic transcription, semantic segmentation, and entity linking of Italian parliamentary speeches. The pipeline employs a specialised OCR model to extract text while preserving reading order, followed by a large-scale Vision-Language Model that performs transcription refinement, element classification, and speaker identification by jointly reasoning over visual layout and textual content. Extracted speakers are then linked to the Chamber of Deputies knowledge base through SPARQL queries and a multi-strategy fuzzy matching procedure. Evaluation against an established benchmark demonstrates substantial improvements both in transcription quality and speaker tagging.

</details>


### [554] [Quid est VERITAS? A Modular Framework for Archival Document Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28108)
*Leonardo Bassanini,Ludovico Biancardi,Alfio Ferrara,Andrea Gamberini,Sergio Picascia,Folco Vaglienti*

Main category: cs.DL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: VERITAS是一个模块化、模型无关的框架，将历史文档数字化重新定义为包含转录、布局分析和语义增强的集成工作流，相比商业OCR基线将词错误率相对降低67.6%，处理时间减少三倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统历史文档数字化仅限于字符级转录，产生缺乏结构和语义信息的平面文本，无法支持实质性的计算分析。需要将数字化重新概念化为包含转录、布局分析和语义增强的集成工作流。

Method: 提出VERITAS框架，采用模块化、模型无关的设计，包含四个阶段：预处理、提取、精炼和增强。使用模式驱动架构，允许研究者声明式指定提取目标。在Bernardino Corio的《米兰史》1600多页文艺复兴编年史上进行评估。

Result: 相比商业OCR基线，词错误率相对降低67.6%，考虑人工校正后端到端处理时间减少三倍。通过检索增强生成系统查询转录语料库，展示了支持历史研究的下游效用。

Conclusion: VERITAS成功将历史文档数字化从简单的字符转录提升为包含结构化和语义增强的综合工作流，显著提高了转录准确性和处理效率，支持更深入的历史计算分析。

Abstract: The digitisation of historical documents has traditionally been conceived as a process limited to character-level transcription, producing flat text that lacks the structural and semantic information necessary for substantive computational analysis. We present VERITAS (Vision-Enhanced Reading, Interpretation, and Transcription of Archival Sources), a modular, model-agnostic framework that reconceptualises digitisation as an integrated workflow encompassing transcription, layout analysis, and semantic enrichment. The pipeline is organised into four stages - Preprocessing, Extraction, Refinement, and Enrichment - and employs a schema-driven architecture that allows researchers to declaratively specify their extraction objectives. We evaluate VERITAS on the critical edition of Bernardino Corio's Storia di Milano, a Renaissance chronicle of over 1,600 pages. Results demonstrate that the pipeline achieves a 67.6% relative reduction in word error rate compared to a commercial OCR baseline, with a threefold reduction in end-to-end processing time when accounting for manual correction. We further illustrate the downstream utility of the pipeline's output by querying the transcribed corpus through a retrieval-augmented generation system, demonstrating its capacity to support historical inquiry.

</details>


### [555] [Q-DIVER: Integrated Quantum Transfer Learning and Differentiable Quantum Architecture Search with EEG Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28122)
*Junghoon Justin Park,Yeonghyeon Park,Jiook Cha*

Main category: quant-ph

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: Q-DIVER：结合预训练EEG编码器与可微分量子架构搜索的混合框架，用于运动想象分类，参数量比传统MLP少50倍


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前量子电路集成到深度学习流程存在启发式设计限制，需要更自动化的方法来发现任务最优的量子电路拓扑结构

Method: 提出Q-DIVER混合框架：1）使用大规模预训练EEG编码器DIVER-1；2）结合可微分量子分类器；3）采用可微分量子架构搜索在端到端微调中自主发现最优电路拓扑

Result: 在PhysioNet运动想象数据集上，量子分类器达到与传统多层感知机相当的预测性能（测试F1：63.49%），同时使用约50倍更少的任务特定头部参数（2.10M vs 105.02M）

Conclusion: 量子迁移学习是高维生物信号处理中一种参数高效的策略，验证了量子电路在深度学习中的实用价值

Abstract: Integrating quantum circuits into deep learning pipelines remains challenging due to heuristic design limitations. We propose Q-DIVER, a hybrid framework combining a large-scale pretrained EEG encoder (DIVER-1) with a differentiable quantum classifier. Unlike fixed-ansatz approaches, we employ Differentiable Quantum Architecture Search to autonomously discover task-optimal circuit topologies during end-to-end fine-tuning. On the PhysioNet Motor Imagery dataset, our quantum classifier achieves predictive performance comparable to classical multi-layer perceptrons (Test F1: 63.49\%) while using approximately \textbf{50$\times$ fewer task-specific head parameters} (2.10M vs. 105.02M). These results validate quantum transfer learning as a parameter-efficient strategy for high-dimensional biological signal processing.

</details>


### [556] [Designing AI for Real Users -- Accessibility Gaps in Retail AI Front-End](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28196)
*Neha Puri,Tim Dixon*

Main category: cs.HC

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 论文探讨AI前端设计中的伦理问题，指出当前AI界面隐含"理想用户身心"假设，对残障用户造成排斥，并提出前端保证作为AI治理的补充方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI伦理讨论主要集中在模型、数据和治理层面，而忽视了用户界面设计中的伦理问题。论文旨在揭示AI前端设计如何隐含"理想用户身心"假设，对视觉、听觉、运动、认知、言语和感官差异用户以及数字素养差异的老年用户造成排斥。

Method: 通过实践导向的洞察，分析零售AI前端（虚拟助手、虚拟试穿系统、超个性化推荐）的设计问题。研究探讨这些系统如何嵌入排斥性交互假设，并分析其背后的商业、组织和采购背景。

Result: 研究发现AI前端设计失败主要不是技术限制，而是商业、组织和采购环境导致，其中可访问性很少成为合同要求。系统隐含的交互假设边缘化了多种残障用户和老年用户。

Conclusion: 提出"前端保证"作为AI治理的实践补充，将智能和多模态的宣称与真实用户的多样性对齐，确保AI系统真正包容所有用户。

Abstract: As AI becomes embedded in customer-facing systems, ethical scrutiny has largely focused on models, data, and governance. Far less attention has been paid to how AI is experienced through user-facing design. This commentary argues that many AI front-ends implicitly assume an 'ideal user body and mind', and that this becomes visible and ethically consequential when examined through the experiences of differently abled users. We explore this through retail AI front-ends for customer engagement - i.e., virtual assistants, virtual try-on systems, and hyper-personalised recommendations. Despite intuitive and inclusive framing, these systems embed interaction assumptions that marginalise users with vision, hearing, motor, cognitive, speech and sensory differences, as well as age-related variation in digital literacy and interaction norms. Drawing on practice-led insights, we argue that these failures persist not primarily due to technical limits, but due to the commercial, organisational, and procurement contexts in which AI front-ends are designed and deployed, where accessibility is rarely contractual. We propose front-end assurance as a practical complement to AI governance, aligning claims of intelligence and multimodality with the diversity of real users.

</details>


### [557] [Learning unified control of internal spin squeezing in atomic qudits for magnetometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28421)
*C. Z. Cao,J. Z. Han,M. Xiong,M. Deng,L. Wang,X. Lv,M. Xue*

Main category: quant-ph

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出使用物理信息强化学习控制多能级原子磁力计中的非线性塞曼效应，将原本限制测量精度的非线性动力学转化为持续的计量资源，实现了超过4dB的自旋压缩和3dB的量子极限优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在多能级原子磁力计中，非线性塞曼效应既是产生自旋压缩量子态的资源，也是限制计量增益的因素。它会导致测量相关正交量的畸变，并且其动力学随时间变化，使得传统控制方法难以有效利用这一效应。

Method: 采用物理信息强化学习方法，仅使用实验可访问的低阶自旋矩，在镝-161原子的f=21/2能级流形中训练智能体。智能体学习统一的控制策略，能够快速制备强自旋压缩态，并在持续的非线性塞曼演化中稳定超过4dB的固定轴自旋压缩。

Result: 学习到的协议实现了13.9 pT/√Hz的单原子磁灵敏度，对应约3dB的标准量子极限优势。包括态制备开销在内，系统能够稳定维持超过4dB的自旋压缩。

Conclusion: 基于学习的控制为将多能级量子传感器中不可避免的本征非线性动力学转化为可操作的计量优势提供了实用途径，展示了强化学习在量子计量中的实际应用价值。

Abstract: Generating and preserving metrologically useful quantum states is a central challenge in quantum-enhanced atomic magnetometry. In multilevel atoms operated in the low-field regime, the nonlinear Zeeman (NLZ) effect is both a resource and a limitation.
